Faith Beyond the Congregation: Religion, Generalized Trust, and Subjective Wellbeing in Contemporary China

[Blinded for Review]

Abstract

Western scholarship holds that religion cultivates generalized trust through congregational participation, but whether this extends to non-Western societies remains contested. Using seven waves of the Chinese General Social Survey (2012–2023; NNN = 78,993), this study shows that religious affiliation is associated with lower generalized trust (b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047, p<.001p < .001p<.001). The negative association is strongest among adherents of Taoism and folk religion (b=−0.087b = -0.087b=−0.087, p<.001p < .001p<.001) and among those who practice weekly or more (b=−0.111b = -0.111b=−0.111, p<.001p < .001p<.001), but is absent for Islam. Causal mediation analysis identifies perceived social fairness as the primary statistical pathway, accounting for 40% of the total association. The trust penalty is concentrated among younger adults aged 18–35 and Han respondents, and coexists with a positive association between religion and happiness (b=0.024b = 0.024b=0.024, p<.05p < .05p<.05), a pattern consistent with religion generating bonding without bridging social capital. The association is robust across ordered logistic regression, propensity score matching, inverse probability weighting, and instrumental variable analysis using province-level religious infrastructure as a geographic instrument (b2SLS=−0.203b_{2SLS} = -0.203b2SLS​=−0.203, p=.015p = .015p=.015; Sargan p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221). These findings demonstrate that the Putnamesque religion–trust nexus is not universal but contingent on the institutional and political environment in which religious life is embedded, and I formalize three scope conditions under which religion undermines rather than promotes generalized trust.

Keywords: religion, generalized trust, social capital, China, CGSS, subjective wellbeing

Introduction  介绍

Does religion promote generalized social trust? A dominant tradition in American sociology, anchored in Putnam (2000) and Coleman (1988), answers affirmatively: religious congregations serve as schools of civic virtue, generating norms of reciprocity, expanding social networks, and fostering the generalized trust that lubricates democratic governance. This “Putnamesque” thesis has shaped two decades of empirical work, most of it conducted in the United States and Western Europe, where mainline Protestant and Catholic congregational structures dominate the religious landscape (Smidt 1999; Wuthnow 1999; Lim and Putnam 2010).
宗教是否促进普遍的社会信任？美国社会学的一个主流观点，以普特南（Putnam，2000）和科尔曼（Coleman，1988）为代表，给出了肯定的答案：宗教团体是公民美德的摇篮，它们塑造互惠规范，拓展社会网络，并促进维系民主治理的普遍信任。这一“普特南式”的论点影响了近二十年的实证研究，其中大部分研究在美国和西欧进行，在这些地区，主流新教和天主教的教会组织结构主导着宗教格局（Smidt，1999；Wuthnow，1999；Lim and Putnam，2010）。

Yet the Putnamesque thesis rests on institutional preconditions that are far from universal. In societies where the state actively regulates religious expression, where religious organizations operate outside mainstream civic infrastructure, and where religious identity marks social marginality rather than integration, the relationship between religion and trust may look very different. China offers a theoretically strategic case. Its religious ecology, characterized by state regulation, institutional fragmentation, and the coexistence of Buddhism, Taoism, folk religion, Islam, and Christianity under an officially atheist party-state, departs sharply from the congregational models that underpin Western theories of religion and social capital (Yang 2006, 2010, 2014).
然而，普特纳姆式的论点所依据的制度前提远非普世适用。在国家积极规制宗教表达、宗教组织游离于主流公民基础设施之外、宗教身份标志着社会边缘化而非融入的社会中，宗教与信任之间的关系可能截然不同。中国提供了一个具有理论战略意义的案例。其宗教生态的特点是国家规制、制度碎片化，以及在官方无神论的党国体制下佛教、道教、民间宗教、伊斯兰教和基督教的共存，这与支撑西方宗教和社会资本理论的会众模式截然不同（杨，2006，2010，2014）。

Despite the growing sociological interest in Chinese religion (Yang 2011; Cao 2010; Fan 2011), quantitative evidence on its relationship with generalized trust remains scarce and contradictory. Several studies using single waves of the Chinese General Social Survey (CGSS) have reported null or mixed associations. Niu and Zhao (2018), studying rural-urban migrants, found that religion was negatively associated with trust in strangers, suggesting that religious identity among mobile populations may reinforce particularistic ties at the expense of generalized trust. Hu (2013), using propensity score matching among urban Chinese, found that Protestants exhibited significantly lower generalized trust than non-Protestants while showing higher trust in religious adherents and religious organizations—a pattern suggestive of particularistic rather than generalized trust among Chinese Christians. Zhang and Li (2020) found tradition-specific variation, with Buddhism and Christianity showing different patterns, but their single-wave design limited statistical power. On the wellbeing side, Luo and Chen (2021), using latent class analysis with China Family Panel Studies data, identified distinct profiles of religious salience and found that religious adherents had higher life satisfaction, with stronger effects among the socioeconomically disadvantaged. None of these studies has systematically pooled multiple waves, tested for causal mediation, or examined the institutional mechanisms linking religion to trust in the Chinese context.
尽管社会学界对中国宗教的兴趣日益浓厚（Yang 2011; Cao 2010; Fan 2011），但关于宗教与普遍信任关系的定量证据仍然匮乏且相互矛盾。一些利用中国综合社会调查（CGSS）单次数据的研究报告了零关联或混合关联。Niu 和 Zhao（2018）研究了城乡流动人口，发现宗教与对陌生人的信任呈负相关，这表明流动人口的宗教认同可能会强化特殊关系，从而削弱普遍信任。Hu（2013）利用倾向得分匹配法研究了中国城市居民，发现基督教新教徒的普遍信任显著低于非新教徒，但他们对宗教信徒和宗教组织的信任度更高——这种模式表明中国基督徒更倾向于特殊信任而非普遍信任。Zhang 和 Li（2020）发现不同宗教传统之间存在差异，佛教和基督教呈现出不同的模式，但他们的单次调查设计限制了统计效力。在幸福感方面，罗和陈（2021）利用中国家庭追踪调查数据进行潜在类别分析，识别出宗教显著性的不同特征，并发现宗教信徒的生活满意度更高，且这种影响在社会经济地位较低的人群中更为显著。然而，这些研究均未系统地整合多轮数据，检验因果中介效应，也未考察在中国背景下宗教与信任之间的制度机制。

This study addresses these gaps with four contributions. First, I pool seven waves of the CGSS (2012–2023; NNN = 78,993) to provide the most statistically powerful quantitative assessment to date of the religion–trust relationship in China, testing whether the association is robust across survey years, model specifications, and population subgroups. Second, I disaggregate religious affiliation by tradition (Buddhism, Taoism/folk religion, Islam, Christianity) and by practice intensity. This disaggregation is theoretically motivated: China’s religious traditions occupy different positions in the state’s regulatory hierarchy, possess different degrees of congregational organization, and maintain different relationships with mainstream Han society, and these institutional differences should produce heterogeneous effects if the theoretical mechanisms I propose are correct. Third, I probe the mechanisms behind the religion–trust deficit through a two-step analytic strategy. I first test whether religion’s negative association with trust is mediated by perceived social fairness and self-rated health, two pathways that correspond to the institutional alienation and marginalization mechanisms, respectively. I then test an alternative mechanism: if religion in China functions purely as a source of social disadvantage, its effects should be uniformly negative across outcomes; if, instead, religion generates bonding social capital without bridging social capital, it should undermine trust while simultaneously enhancing subjective wellbeing. The happiness models therefore serve as a diagnostic test of the domain-specificity of religion’s effects, distinguishing between a “uniformly negative” account and a “bonding-without-bridging” account. Fourth, I assess the robustness of the main finding through an extensive battery of identification strategies, including propensity score matching, inverse probability weighting, province fixed effects, and, most distinctively, an instrumental variable analysis that combines province-level leave-one-out religiosity with geographic data on religious sites from the 2004 National Economic Census (Yang 2018). These two conceptually distinct instruments produce convergent estimates (Sargan p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221) that are approximately four times larger than OLS, providing quasi-experimental evidence that the cross-sectional association substantially underestimates the causal effect.
本研究通过四项贡献弥补了这些研究空白。首先，我整合了中国社会调查（CGSS）的七轮数据（2012-2023；样本量 NNN = 78,993），对中国宗教与信任的关系进行了迄今为止统计效力最强的定量评估，并检验了这种关联在不同调查年份、模型设定和人口亚组中的稳健性。其次，我按宗教传统（佛教、道教/民间宗教、伊斯兰教、基督教）和实践强度对宗教信仰进行了细分。这种细分是基于理论依据的：中国不同的宗教传统在国家监管体系中占据不同的地位，拥有不同程度的宗教组织，并与汉族主流社会保持着不同的关系，如果我提出的理论机制正确，这些制度差异应该会产生不同的影响。第三，我通过两步分析策略探究了宗教与信任缺失背后的机制。我首先检验宗教与信任之间的负相关性是否由感知到的社会公平和自我评价的健康所中介，这两条路径分别对应于制度疏离和边缘化机制。然后，我检验另一种机制：如果宗教在中国仅仅作为一种社会劣势的来源发挥作用​​，那么它对所有结果的影响应该是一致的负面的；相反，如果宗教能够产生凝聚型社会资本而缺乏桥梁型社会资本，那么它应该在削弱信任的同时提升主观幸福感。因此，幸福模型可以作为宗教影响领域特异性的诊断性检验，区分“一致负面”的解释和“凝聚型但不产生桥梁型”的解释。 第四，我通过一系列广泛的识别策略来评估主要发现的稳健性，包括倾向得分匹配、逆概率加权、省份固定效应，以及最独特的工具变量分析。该分析将省级留一法宗教信仰程度与 2004 年全国经济普查中的宗教场所地理数据相结合（Yang 2018）。这两个概念上不同的工具变量产生了收敛的估计值（Sargan p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221 ），其值约为普通最小二乘法（OLS）估计值的四倍，这提供了准实验证据，表明横截面关联性显著低估了因果效应。

The core finding is counterintuitive from a Western perspective: religious affiliation is consistently associated with lower generalized trust in China, even after adjusting for a comprehensive set of demographic and socioeconomic controls. This negative association is not an artifact of compositional differences, nor is it confined to a single religious tradition; it appears across Buddhist, Taoist/folk, and Christian affiliations, and intensifies with greater practice frequency. Mediation analysis reveals that perceived social fairness accounts for 40% of this deficit, consistent with the institutional alienation mechanism, while self-rated health accounts for only 6%, suggesting that the trust penalty is rooted in perceptions of the social order rather than demographic disadvantage. The alternative mechanism test is equally revealing: religion is positively associated with happiness (b=0.024b = 0.024b=0.024, p<.05p < .05p<.05), ruling out the possibility that religious identity is uniformly disadvantageous and supporting the bonding-without-bridging interpretation. Religious involvement in China enhances personal wellbeing through bonding capital (meaning, community, existential comfort) while simultaneously eroding the generalized trust that requires bridging capital (civic engagement, cross-group ties, institutional legitimacy). These findings challenge the assumption that religion is universally a source of “bridging” social capital and call for greater attention to the political and institutional contexts that shape religion’s civic consequences.
从西方视角来看，核心发现与直觉相悖：即使在调整了一系列全面的人口统计和社会经济控制变量后，宗教信仰仍然与中国较低的总体信任度持续相关。这种负相关并非构成差异所致，也并非局限于单一宗教传统；它存在于佛教、道教/民间信仰和基督教信仰中，并且随着宗教活动频率的增加而加剧。中介分析表明，感知到的社会公平可以解释这种信任度下降的 40%，这与制度疏离机制相符；而自评健康状况仅能解释 6%，这表明信任度下降的根源在于对社会秩序的感知，而非人口统计劣势。另一种机制检验同样具有启发性：宗教信仰与幸福感呈正相关（ b=0.024b = 0.024b=0.024 ， p<.05p < .05p<.05 ），这排除了宗教身份普遍不利的可能性，并支持了“联结而非桥梁”的解释。在中国，宗教活动通过凝聚资本（意义、社群、生存慰藉）提升个人福祉，但同时也削弱了需要桥梁资本（公民参与、跨群体联系、制度合法性）才能建立的普遍信任。这些发现挑战了宗教普遍是“桥梁”社会资本来源的假设，并呼吁人们更加关注塑造宗教公民影响的政治和制度背景。

Background  背景

Religion and Trust: The Western Paradigm
宗教与信任：西方范式

The proposition that religion generates social trust has deep roots in both classical and contemporary sociology. Durkheim (1912) argued that religious rituals create “collective effervescence,” binding individuals into moral communities and reinforcing shared normative commitments. In this tradition, religion produces trust not primarily through theological belief but through the social practices of communal worship, what Putnam (2000) later termed the “social capital” dimension of religious life. Putnam (2000) documented that regular churchgoers in the United States were more likely to trust their neighbors, volunteer, and participate in civic organizations. Lim and Putnam (2010) refined this argument, showing that it is not faith per se but “friends in the congregation,” the relational networks formed through congregational life, that explain religion’s positive association with life satisfaction and civic engagement.
宗教能够建立社会信任的观点在古典社会学和当代社会学中都根深蒂固。涂尔干（1912）认为，宗教仪式能够创造“集体欢腾”，将个体凝聚成道德共同体，并强化共同的规范承诺。在这种传统观念下，宗教建立信任并非主要通过神学信仰，而是通过集体礼拜的社会实践，即普特南（2000）后来称之为宗教生活的“社会资本”维度。普特南（2000）的研究表明，在美国，经常参加教会活动的人更有可能信任邻居、参与志愿服务并加入公民组织。林和普特南（2010）进一步完善了这一论点，指出并非信仰本身，而是“教会中的朋友”，即通过教会生活形成的各种关系网络，才是宗教与生活满意度和公民参与之间积极关联的关键所在。

Subsequent empirical work has broadly supported this thesis, particularly in the American context. Welch et al. (2004), analyzing data from the 2000 National Election Study, found that the positive effects of religion on trust were concentrated on the generalized trust measure; many types of religious belief or involvement either did not affect trust or had negative effects, and exclusive religious beliefs decreased trust in people. Smidt (1999) linked church membership to civic voluntarism across multiple U.S. surveys, and Glanville et al. (2013), using panel data from the 2006–2008 General Social Survey, provided some of the strongest causal evidence to date that bridging social connections generate trust over time. Welch et al. (2007) found that Catholics and members of other denominations showed significantly less trust in strangers than mainline Protestants, and that personal religiosity and congregational activity showed no significant relationship to trust once social embeddedness was accounted for—highlighting that the religion–trust link operates through social networks rather than religious belief per se.
后续的实证研究广泛支持了这一论点，尤其是在美国背景下。Welch 等人（2004）分析了 2000 年全国选举研究的数据，发现宗教对信任的积极影响主要集中在广义信任指标上；许多类型的宗教信仰或参与要么对信任没有影响，要么产生负面影响，而排他性宗教信仰会降低人们对他人的信任。Smidt（1999）通过多项美国调查将教会成员身份与公民志愿服务联系起来，而 Glanville 等人（2013）利用 2006-2008 年综合社会调查的面板数据，提供了迄今为止最有力的因果证据之一，表明建立社会联系能够随着时间的推移增强信任。Welch 等人（2004）的研究也支持了这一观点。 （2007 年）的研究发现，天主教徒和其他教派的成员对陌生人的信任度明显低于主流新教徒，而且一旦考虑到社会嵌入性，个人宗教信仰和教会活动与信任之间就没有显著关系——这凸显了宗教与信任之间的联系是通过社会网络而不是宗教信仰本身来运作的。

Cross-nationally, however, the picture is more complicated. Berggren and Bjornskov (2011), analyzing Gallup World Poll data from 105 countries and the U.S. states, found a robust negative relationship between the importance of religion in daily life and social trust, both internationally and within the United States. Dingemans and Ingen (2015), using European Values Survey data, found that the effects of religiosity on trust were ambivalent: integration in religious communities furthered trust, but religious socialization and the subjective importance of God lowered it. Ruiter and Tubergen (2009), analyzing religious attendance across 60 countries, demonstrated that state regulation of religion significantly shapes participation patterns, with implications for the civic engagement pathways emphasized in the social capital literature. Traunmüller (2011), using multilevel data from 97 German regions, showed that while individual religiosity was positively associated with trust, religious heterogeneity at the community level undermined it, a compositional paradox whereby diversity in the religious landscape eroded the very trust that individual religion could generate. Iannaccone (1994) and Finke and Stark (1998) demonstrated that the structure of religious markets, specifically the degree of competition and regulatory constraint, shapes the organizational forms that religious groups adopt, with implications for their capacity to generate bridging social capital. Stolle (2002) and Newton (2001) emphasized that generalized trust has institutional as well as associational roots, suggesting that the Putnamesque thesis may overstate the causal role of voluntary organizations, including religious ones. Norenzayan and Shariff (2008) proposed an evolutionary framework arguing that religion promotes prosociality primarily through belief in moralizing supernatural agents, an account that locates the trust-generating mechanism in theology rather than social structure and thus predicts weaker effects in traditions without strong supernatural monitoring beliefs.
然而，跨国视角下的情况则更为复杂。Berggren 和 Bjornskov (2011) 分析了盖洛普世界民意调查中来自 105 个国家和美国各州的数据，发现宗教在日常生活中的重要性与社会信任之间存在显著的负相关关系，这种关系既存在于国际层面，也存在于美国国内。Dingemans 和 Ingen (2015) 利用欧洲价值观调查的数据发现，宗教信仰对信任的影响是矛盾的：融入宗教团体可以提升信任度，但宗教社会化以及对上帝的主观重视程度会降低信任度。Ruiter 和 Tubergen (2009) 分析了 60 个国家的宗教活动参与情况，表明国家对宗教的监管显著影响着参与模式，这对社会资本文献中强调的公民参与路径具有重要意义。 Traunmüller (2011) 利用来自德国 97 个地区的多层数据表明，虽然个人宗教信仰与信任呈正相关，但社区层面的宗教异质性却削弱了这种信任，这是一种构成悖论，即宗教格局的多样性反而侵蚀了个人宗教信仰所能产生的信任。Iannaccone (1994) 以及 Finke 和 Stark (1998) 证明，宗教市场的结构，特别是竞争程度和监管约束，会影响宗教团体所采取的组织形式，进而影响它们构建桥梁型社会资本的能力。Stolle (2002) 和 Newton (2001) 强调，普遍信任既源于制度，也源于社群，这表明普特纳姆式的理论可能夸大了包括宗教组织在内的志愿组织的因果作用。 Norenzayan 和 Shariff (2008) 提出了一个进化框架，认为宗教主要通过对道德化的超自然力量的信仰来促进亲社会行为。这一解释将信任的产生机制置于神学而非社会结构中，因此预测在没有强烈的超自然监督信仰的传统中，其效果会较弱。

Several scholars have raised more fundamental objections. Uslaner (2002) argued that generalized trust is a stable moral orientation rooted in early socialization, what he termed “moralistic trust,” rather than a product of adult organizational participation, implying that the observed correlation between religion and trust may reflect selection rather than causation. People who are trusting may sort into religious communities, rather than religion making them trustworthy. Alesina and Ferrara (2002) showed that ethnic and religious fragmentation was associated with lower trust in cross-national data, suggesting that religion functions as a source of in-group solidarity that may actually narrow the “radius of trust” (Fukuyama 1995). Delhey et al. (2011) formalized this concern, demonstrating that the radius of “most people” in the standard trust question varies considerably across countries—substantially narrower in Confucian societies—with important implications for cross-cultural comparisons of trust. This “dark side” of religious social capital, the strengthening of particularistic bonds at the expense of universalistic trust, has been documented even in the United States, where Putnam and Campbell (2010) noted that evangelical Protestantism can generate insular communities with limited bridging ties. Paxton (2002) further noted that the trust-generating capacity of associations depends on their internal structure and the extent to which they bridge social cleavages. Associations that are internally diverse and externally connected foster generalized trust; those that are homogeneous and insular may actually erode it. Marshall and Olson (2018) showed that the denominational composition of geographic areas, not just individual affiliation, shapes trust: the percentage of evangelical Protestants in a local population negatively predicted generalized trust even among non-evangelicals, suggesting that religious subcultures shape the trust environment for entire communities.
一些学者提出了更为根本性的反对意见。乌斯兰纳（Uslaner，2002）认为，普遍信任是一种稳定的道德取向，根植于早期社会化，他称之为“道德信任”，而非成年后参与组织活动的产物。这意味着，观察到的宗教与信任之间的相关性可能反映的是选择而非因果关系。人们可能倾向于加入宗教团体，而非宗教使他们值得信任。阿莱西纳和费拉拉（Alesina & Ferrara，2002）的研究表明，跨国数据显示，种族和宗教的分裂与较低的信任度相关，这表明宗教作为一种群体内部团结的来源，实际上可能会缩小“信任半径”（福山，1995）。德尔海等人（Delhey et al.，2011）正式阐述了这一担忧，他们证明，在标准的信任问题中，“大多数人”的信任半径在不同国家之间存在显著差异——在儒家社会中明显更窄——这对跨文化信任比较具有重要意义。宗教社会资本的这种“阴暗面”，即以牺牲普世信任为代价来强化特殊主义纽带，即使在美国也有所体现。普特南和坎贝尔（2010）指出，福音派新教可能会形成封闭的社群，彼此之间的联系十分有限。帕克斯顿（2002）进一步指出，社群建立信任的能力取决于其内部结构以及弥合社会分歧的程度。内部多元化且外部联系紧密的社群能够促进普遍信任；而那些同质化且封闭的社群则可能削弱这种信任。 Marshall 和 Olson (2018) 的研究表明，地理区域的教派构成，而不仅仅是个人的归属感，会影响信任：当地人口中福音派新教徒的比例，即使在非福音派教徒中，也会对普遍信任产生负面影响，这表明宗教亚文化会影响整个社区的信任环境。

These critiques suggest that the religion–trust relationship is not a sociological law but a contingent empirical regularity that depends on the character of religious organizations, the composition of their memberships, and the broader institutional environment in which they operate. Moving beyond the Western context, where most evidence originates, is therefore essential for understanding the scope conditions of the Putnamesque thesis.
这些批评表明，宗教与信任的关系并非一条社会学定律，而是一种偶然的经验规律，它取决于宗教组织的性质、成员构成以及它们所处的更广泛的制度环境。因此，要理解普特纳姆式论题的适用范围，就必须超越西方语境——因为大多数证据都来源于西方语境。

Religion in China’s Regulated Market
中国管制市场中的宗教

China’s religious landscape differs fundamentally from the congregational ecology assumed in Western theories. Three features are particularly relevant.
中国的宗教格局与西方理论中假设的宗教社群生态存在根本差异。其中三个特点尤为值得关注。

First, the Chinese state actively regulates religious life through a corporatist system that recognizes only five official religions (Buddhism, Taoism, Islam, Catholicism, and Protestantism) under party-supervised patriotic associations (Yang 2006). Religious activity that falls outside these officially sanctioned channels, including the vast terrain of folk religion, popular Buddhism, and unregistered house churches, occupies what Yang (2006) calls the “grey” and “black” markets of religion. This regulatory framework means that religious participation in China does not carry the civic legitimacy it does in American communities; it may instead signal marginality, political nonconformity, or membership in stigmatized social categories.
首先，中国政府通过社团主义体制积极管控宗教生活，该体制仅承认五种官方宗教（佛教、道教、伊斯兰教、天主教和基督教），并由党组织管理的爱国社团进行管理（杨，2006）。那些游离于官方认可渠道之外的宗教活动，包括广袤的民间宗教、大众佛教和未注册的家庭教会，占据了杨（2006）所称的宗教“灰色”和“黑色”市场。这种管控框架意味着，在中国，宗教参与并不像在美国那样具有公民合法性；相反，它可能意味着边缘化、政治异议或被污名化的社会群体成员身份。

Second, China lacks the congregational infrastructure that Putnam (2000) identified as the mechanism linking religion to social capital in the United States. Buddhist and Taoist temples function primarily as sites for individual devotion and occasional ritual, not as membership organizations with weekly services, small-group programs, and civic outreach (Ji 2008; Chau 2006). Even Chinese Protestant churches, which most closely approximate the Western congregational model, operate under restrictions that limit their capacity for civil society engagement (Cao 2010; Ashiwa and Wank 2009). Yet Protestant Christianity has experienced remarkable growth; Sun (2017) argued that Protestantism flourished in the post-Mao era precisely because the Maoist state had dissolved locally entrenched social and cultural resistance to Protestantism, while the subsequent market-oriented reforms created an environment conducive to its expansion. Fan (2011) has argued that Chinese religiosity is characterized by “diffused” rather than “institutional” patterns, embedded in daily life, kinship, and community rather than organized through formal religious institutions. Leamaster and Hu (2014) showed that Buddhist identity in China is strongly associated with popular religious involvement, with formally committed Buddhists representing only one segment of a much larger population of “popular Buddhists” whose practices fall outside congregational structures. Yang and Hu (2012), mapping the landscape of Chinese folk religion, demonstrated the enormous diversity of practices subsumed under this category, complicating any straightforward application of Western denominational frameworks.
其次，中国缺乏普特南（Putnam，2000）所指出的美国宗教与社会资本相联系的那种社群基础设施。佛教和道教寺庙主要作为个人虔诚祈祷和偶尔举行仪式的场所，而非拥有每周礼拜、小组活动和公民服务等会员制组织的机构（Ji，2008；Chau，2006）。即使是与西方社群模式最为接近的中国基督教新教教会，也受到诸多限制，难以参与公民社会活动（Cao，2010；Ashiwa and Wank，2009）。然而，基督教新教却经历了显著的增长；孙（Sun，2017）认为，基督教新教在后毛泽东时代蓬勃发展，正是因为毛泽东时代的国家瓦解了根深蒂固的社会和文化对基督教新教的抵制，而随后的市场化改革则创造了有利于其扩张的环境。范（2011）认为，中国宗教信仰的特征是“扩散式”而非“制度式”，它根植于日常生活、亲属关系和社区之中，而非通过正式的宗教机构组织起来。利马斯特和胡（2014）的研究表明，中国的佛教身份认同与民众的宗教参与密切相关，正式的佛教徒只是庞大的“民间佛教徒”群体中的一部分，后者的宗教实践并不局限于任何宗教团体。杨和胡（2012）通过对中国民间宗教的梳理，揭示了这一范畴下宗教实践的巨大多样性，使得直接套用西方教派框架变得复杂。

Third, the ideological context of an officially atheist party-state creates distinctive pressures on religious adherents. CCP members are formally prohibited from holding religious beliefs, and religious affiliation may carry implicit costs in terms of political trust and institutional integration (Potter 2003; Sarkissian 2015). The party-state’s relationship with religion is not one of simple repression but of what Yang (2006) calls a “triple-market” model: a red market of state-sanctioned religion, a black market of prohibited religious activities, and a grey market of ambiguously tolerated practices. Religious individuals in China may therefore experience a sense of distance from the state and its institutions that manifests as lower generalized trust, not because religion erodes their capacity for trust per se, but because their religious identity positions them outside the institutional mainstream.
第三，官方无神论的党国意识形态背景给宗教信徒带来了独特的压力。中共党员被正式禁止持有宗教信仰，而宗教信仰可能会在政治信任和制度融入方面带来隐性成本（Potter 2003; Sarkissian 2015）。党国与宗教的关系并非简单的压制，而是杨（2006）所说的“三重市场”模式：国家认可的宗教的红色市场、被禁止的宗教活动的黑色市场以及被模糊容忍的宗教活动的灰色市场。因此，中国的宗教人士可能会感受到与国家及其制度的疏离感，这种疏离感表现为普遍信任度较低，并非因为宗教本身削弱了他们的信任能力，而是因为他们的宗教身份使他们游离于制度主流之外。

These three features, namely state regulation, absence of congregational infrastructure, and ideological marginality, collectively distinguish the Chinese religious landscape from the Western congregational model that undergirds the Putnamesque thesis. Taken together, they suggest that, contrary to the Western paradigm:
这三个特征，即国家监管、缺乏教会基础设施以及意识形态边缘化，共同将中国宗教格局与支撑普特纳姆式论点的西方教会模式区分开来。总而言之，它们表明，与西方范式相反：

H1: Religious affiliation is negatively associated with generalized social trust in China.
H1：在中国，宗教信仰与普遍的社会信任呈负相关。

I next develop the specific mechanisms through which this reversal may operate.
接下来，我将阐述这种逆转可能发生的具体机制。

Why Religion May Undermine Trust in China
宗教为何可能削弱人们对中国的信任

Building on these contextual features, I identify three mechanisms through which religion might be negatively associated with generalized trust in China.
基于这些背景特征，我确定了宗教在中国可能与普遍信任产生负相关的三种机制。

The marginalization mechanism. Religious affiliation in China is associated with demographic characteristics (older age, lower education, female gender, rural residence, ethnic minority status) that independently predict lower social trust (Niu and Zhao 2018; Bian and Li 2012). To the extent that religious identity reflects or reinforces social marginality, the observed trust deficit may partly capture the compounded disadvantages of religious adherents’ structural position. I address this through extensive covariate adjustment, but the compositional explanation cannot be fully ruled out in observational data. Because the degree of institutional marginalization varies across traditions, as Taoism and folk religion are the least organizationally integrated while Islam enjoys recognized ethnic-minority status:
边缘化机制。在中国，宗教信仰与一些人口特征（年龄较大、教育程度较低、女性、居住在农村、少数民族身份）相关，这些特征本身就能预测较低的社会信任度（Niu and Zhao 2018; Bian and Li 2012）。如果宗教身份反映或强化了社会边缘化，那么观察到的信任缺失可能部分反映了宗教信徒结构性地位所带来的多重不利影响。我通过广泛的协变量调整来解决这个问题，但在观察数据中，构成性解释无法完全排除。因为不同宗教传统的制度性边缘化程度各不相同，例如道教和民间宗教的组织整合程度最低，而伊斯兰教则享有公认的少数民族地位：

H2: The negative association varies by religious tradition, with stronger effects for traditions that are more institutionally marginalized or communally insular.
H2：这种负相关性因宗教传统而异，对于制度上更边缘化或社群上更封闭的传统，这种影响更为显著。

The in-group solidarity mechanism. Following Fukuyama (1995) and Uslaner (2002), religious involvement may strengthen trust within one’s own religious community while narrowing trust toward outsiders. In China’s fragmented religious landscape, where religious groups operate with limited cross-tradition interaction and under state suspicion, this particularistic trust may come at the direct expense of generalized trust (Sarkissian 2015; Grim and Finke 2006). Glanville and Shi (2020) have shown that collectivist cultural orientations constrain the extension of trust to outgroups, a pattern with particular relevance for China where collectivist norms intersect with religious group boundaries. Traunmüller (2011) provided evidence for this dynamic in European contexts, and Delhey and Newton (2005) showed that ethnic and religious heterogeneity was inversely associated with generalized trust cross-nationally. Because deeper religious engagement should strengthen both in-group identification and outgroup distance:
群体内部团结机制。根据福山（Fukuyama，1995）和乌斯兰纳（Uslaner，2002）的研究，宗教参与可能会增强个体对自身宗教社群内部的信任，同时缩小对外部群体的信任范围。在中国宗教格局分散的情况下，宗教团体之间的跨传统互动有限，且受到国家监管，这种特殊性的信任可能会直接损害普遍的信任（Sarkissian，2015；Grim 和 Finke，2006）。格兰维尔和史（Glanville & Shi，2020）的研究表明，集体主义文化取向会限制信任向外部群体的延伸，这一模式在中国尤为重要，因为中国的集体主义规范与宗教群体边界相互交织。特劳恩米勒（Traunmüller，2011）在欧洲背景下也提供了这种动态的证据，而德尔海和牛顿（Delhey & Newton，2005）则表明，跨国界的族裔和宗教异质性与普遍信任呈负相关。因为更深入的宗教参与应该会增强群体内部认同感并拉开与外部群体的距离：

H3: Greater intensity of religious practice amplifies the negative association with trust.
H3：宗教实践强度越大，与信任的负面关联就越大。

The institutional alienation mechanism. Religious individuals in China may hold lower generalized trust because their experience of state regulation, including restrictions on religious assembly, publishing, and education, erodes their confidence in the fairness and reliability of social institutions more broadly (Rothstein and Stolle 2005). Rothstein and Stolle (2005)’s ((2005)) institutional theory of trust holds that generalized trust is a downstream consequence of citizens’ perceptions that social institutions operate fairly and impartially. If religious individuals in China perceive the state as unfair, because it restricts their religious freedom, treats religious organizations with suspicion, or excludes them from full political participation, this sense of institutional injustice may generalize into a broader skepticism about whether “most people in this society can be trusted.”
制度异化机制。中国的宗教人士可能普遍缺乏信任感，因为他们经历的国家监管，包括对宗教集会、出版和教育的限制，削弱了他们对社会制度公平性和可靠性的普遍信心（Rothstein and Stolle 2005）。Rothstein 和 Stolle (2005) 的制度信任理论认为，普遍信任是公民对社会制度公平公正运作的感知所产生的下游结果。如果中国的宗教人士认为国家不公平，例如限制他们的宗教自由、怀疑宗教组织或将他们排除在充分的政治参与之外，这种制度不公正感可能会演变为对“这个社会中的大多数人是否值得信任”的更广泛的怀疑。

The causal logic connecting these three mechanisms to observable mediators proceeds as follows. Perceived social fairness captures the institutional alienation mechanism: state regulation of religion generates experiences of unequal treatment, bureaucratic scrutiny, and exclusion from political participation, which religious individuals interpret as evidence that “current society is not fair.” Because Rothstein and Stolle (2005) demonstrated that perceived institutional fairness is among the strongest predictors of generalized trust cross-nationally, any systematic reduction in fairness perceptions among religious individuals should translate into lower trust. Self-rated health captures the marginalization mechanism through a different channel: religious adherents in China are disproportionately drawn from structurally disadvantaged populations (older, less educated, more rural, lower income), and this demographic profile is associated with poorer health outcomes. Poorer health, in turn, constrains social participation and narrows social networks (Berkman et al. 2000), reducing exposure to the diverse social interactions that sustain generalized trust. Self-rated health thus functions as a summary indicator of the cumulative disadvantage that characterizes China’s religious population and that independently depresses trust. These two mediators capture distinct mechanisms: fairness reflects the political costs of religious identity (institutional alienation), while health reflects the structural costs (demographic marginalization). If the institutional alienation mechanism is the primary driver, fairness should account for a larger share of the association than health; if marginalization predominates, the reverse should hold. I therefore test:
这三种机制与可观察的中介变量之间的因果逻辑如下。感知到的社会公平反映了制度疏离机制：国家对宗教的管制导致宗教人士体验到不平等的待遇、官僚主义的审查以及被排除在政治参与之外，这些都被宗教人士解读为“当前社会不公平”的证据。由于 Rothstein 和 Stolle（2005）的研究表明，感知到的制度公平是跨国普遍信任的最强预测因素之一，因此，宗教人士公平感知的任何系统性下降都应转化为信任度的降低。自评健康状况则通过不同的渠道反映了边缘化机制：中国的宗教信徒大多来自结构性弱势群体（年龄较大、受教育程度较低、居住在农村地区、收入较低），而这种人口特征与较差的健康状况相关。较差的健康状况反过来又会限制社会参与并缩小社交网络（Berkman 等人，2000），从而减少他们接触维持普遍信任所需的多样化社会互动的机会。因此，自评健康状况可以作为衡量中国宗教群体所面临的累积劣势的指标，而这种劣势本身就会抑制信任感。这两个中介变量反映了不同的机制：公平反映了宗教身份的政治成本（制度疏离），而健康反映了结构性成本（人口边缘化）。如果制度疏离机制是主要驱动因素，那么公平在关联中所占的比重应该大于健康；如果边缘化机制占主导地位，则情况则相反。因此，我检验以下假设：

H4: The religion–trust deficit is partially mediated by (a) lower perceived social fairness (institutional alienation pathway) and (b) poorer self-rated health (marginalization pathway), with fairness accounting for the larger share.
H4：宗教信任赤字部分是由（a）感知到的社会公平性较低（制度疏离路径）和（b）自我评价的健康状况较差（边缘化路径）所介导的，其中公平性占比更大。

These three mechanisms are not mutually exclusive; they may operate simultaneously, with their relative importance varying across religious traditions and social strata. The empirical analysis is designed to adjudicate among them by testing for mediation through fairness and health (institutional alienation and marginalization mechanisms) and for heterogeneity across population subgroups (all three mechanisms).
这三种机制并非互斥；它们可能同时发挥作用，其相对重要性因宗教传统和社会阶层而异。实证分析旨在通过检验公平与健康（制度性疏离和边缘化机制）的中介作用，以及人口亚群体间的异质性（所有三种机制），来对它们进行评判。

Synthesizing the contextual analysis and the three mechanisms, I propose that the Putnamesque religion–trust thesis is contingent on three scope conditions: (1) state regulation of religion, where the state restricts and surveils religious life, the institutional alienation mechanism is activated; (2) absence of congregational infrastructure, where religious participation is individual or episodic rather than organized through membership institutions, the civic-engagement mechanism that generates bridging trust is absent; and (3) religious identity as social marginality, where religious affiliation signals distance from the political or cultural mainstream, the in-group solidarity and marginalization mechanisms are activated. When all three conditions are met, as in China, Vietnam, and some Central Asian states, religion should undermine rather than promote generalized trust. When none holds, as in the American voluntary religious marketplace, the Putnamesque thesis applies.
综合语境分析和三种机制，我认为普特纳姆式的宗教-信任论题取决于三个范围条件：（1）国家对宗教的管制，即国家限制和监视宗教生活，此时制度性异化机制被激活；（2）缺乏教会组织，即宗教参与是个人或偶发性的，而非通过成员机构组织起来，此时产生信任桥梁的公民参与机制缺失；（3）宗教身份等同于社会边缘性，即宗教信仰表明与政治或文化主流的疏离，此时群体内部的团结和边缘化机制被激活。当所有三个条件都满足时，例如在中国、越南和一些中亚国家，宗教应该会削弱而非促进普遍的信任。当这三个条件都不满足时，例如在美国自愿参与的宗教市场中，普特纳姆式的论题仍然适用。

Religion and Subjective Wellbeing: Testing an Alternative Mechanism
宗教与主观幸福感：检验一种替代机制

The three mechanisms outlined above explain why religion may undermine generalized trust in China. But if religion in China functions solely as a source of social marginalization and institutional alienation, we would expect its effects to be uniformly negative across all social outcomes. A critical test of this interpretation is whether religion simultaneously enhances subjective wellbeing, an outcome that operates through a theoretically distinct set of mechanisms. If religion undermines trust and undermines happiness, the explanation is straightforward: religious identity in China is simply disadvantageous. If, however, religion undermines trust while enhancing happiness, a more nuanced theoretical account is required, one that can explain why the same social phenomenon produces opposing effects across different domains.
上述三种机制解释了宗教为何可能削弱中国普遍的信任。但如果宗教在中国仅仅起到社会边缘化和制度疏离的作用，我们预期其对所有社会结果的影响都将是一致的负面的。检验这一解释的关键在于，宗教是否同时提升了主观幸福感——而主观幸福感的提升是通过一套理论上截然不同的机制实现的。如果宗教削弱信任并降低幸福感，那么解释就很简单：在中国，宗教身份本身就是一种不利因素。然而，如果宗教削弱信任的同时提升幸福感，则需要一种更为细致的理论解释，以说明为何同一种社会现象会在不同的领域产生截然相反的影响。

The bonding-versus-bridging distinction in social capital theory provides this account. Putnam (2000) distinguished between bonding social capital, the solidarity and mutual support that circulate within tight-knit, homogeneous communities, and bridging social capital, the generalized norms and cross-cutting ties that connect diverse groups. Religion can generate both types, but the relative balance depends on institutional context. In Western democracies with established congregational traditions, weekly church attendance provides both: bonding capital through congregational fellowship and bridging capital through civic engagement, interfaith dialogue, and community service (Wuthnow 1999; Lim and Putnam 2010). In China’s regulated religious market, the conditions for bridging capital are absent, as religious organizations lack the civic infrastructure, cross-group programming, and institutional legitimacy that enable generalized norm formation, but the conditions for bonding capital remain intact. Religious communities, even those operating under state constraints, still provide existential meaning, communal solidarity, and psychological resources to their members. This asymmetry predicts domain-specific effects: trust, which requires bridging capital, should suffer, while happiness, which draws on bonding capital and personal meaning-making, should benefit.
社会资本理论中的“凝聚型”与“桥梁型”区分对此有所解释。普特南（2000）区分了凝聚型社会资本和桥梁型社会资本。凝聚型社会资本指的是在紧密联系的同质社区内部流通的团结和互助，而桥梁型社会资本指的是连接不同群体的普遍规范和跨领域联系。宗教可以产生这两种类型的社会资本，但二者的相对平衡取决于制度环境。在拥有成熟教会传统的西方民主国家，每周参加教会活动既能提供凝聚型社会资本（通过教会团契），也能提供桥梁型社会资本（通过公民参与、跨宗教对话和社区服务）（Wuthnow 1999；Lim and Putnam 2010）。在中国受监管的宗教市场中，桥梁型社会资本的形成条件缺失，因为宗教组织缺乏形成普遍规范所需的公民基础设施、跨群体项目和制度合法性，但凝聚型社会资本的形成条件依然存在。宗教团体，即使是在国家约束下运作的，仍然能够为其成员提供存在意义、社群凝聚力和心理资源。这种不对称性预示着特定领域的影响：信任（需要桥梁资本）会受到影响，而幸福感（依赖于联结资本和个人意义建构）则会受益。

A substantial literature supports this theoretical expectation. Ellison (1991) proposed that religion enhances wellbeing through existential certainty, divine interaction, and social integration, mechanisms that operate at the personal and communal level rather than through civic engagement. Koenig (2012), reviewing over 3,000 empirical studies, documented a robust positive association between religiosity and mental health across diverse populations. VanderWeele (2017) argued that religious community participation is one of the few upstream factors that simultaneously promotes multiple domains of human flourishing, including happiness, health, meaning, and close relationships. Pargament (1997) showed that positive religious coping (benevolent appraisals, seeking spiritual support) is associated with better psychological adjustment. Upenieks and Orfanidis (2022) showed that trust and religiosity interact in shaping health: a higher subjective importance of God can offset the negative health effects of low generalized trust, but only in highly pluralistic religious contexts, suggesting that the trust and wellbeing pathways are interconnected rather than fully independent.
大量文献支持这一理论预期。埃里森（Ellison，1991）提出，宗教通过存在确定性、与神灵的互动以及社会融合来提升幸福感，这些机制在个人和社群层面发挥作用，而非通过公民参与。科尼格（Koenig，2012）回顾了 3000 多项实证研究，证实了不同人群中宗教信仰与心理健康之间存在显著的正相关关系。范德维尔（VanderWeele，2017）认为，参与宗教社群是少数几个能够同时促进人类多方面发展的上游因素之一，这些方面包括幸福感、健康、意义感和亲密关系。帕格曼特（Pargament，1997）的研究表明，积极的宗教应对方式（例如，善意的评价、寻求精神支持）与更好的心理适应能力相关。 Upenieks 和 Orfanidis (2022) 的研究表明，信任和宗教信仰在塑造健康方面相互作用：对上帝的主观重要性越高，对普遍信任度越低，对健康的负面影响就越大，但这仅在高度多元化的宗教背景下才成立，这表明信任和幸福感的路径是相互关联的，而不是完全独立的。

Evidence from China is consistent with the bonding-without-bridging logic. Brown and Tierney (2009) found that religious participation was positively associated with life satisfaction and happiness among Chinese adults. Wei (2012) documented wellbeing benefits among Chinese Christians, attributing them to the support networks of house churches. Chen and Williams (2016) found a positive religion–wellbeing association in China but argued, critically, that the mechanism was not social capital but rather the private and subjective dimension of religion: adherents maintained an improved sense of social status amid rapid social change, a pathway that operates entirely through bonding and meaning-making rather than civic engagement. Luo and Chen (2021), using latent class analysis with China Family Panel Studies data, showed that it was the salience of religious identity, not mere affiliation, that predicted higher life satisfaction, with stronger effects among those whose religious identity was most central to their self-concept. These findings reinforce the idea that religion’s wellbeing benefits in China flow through personal meaning and communal solidarity, precisely the bonding mechanisms that do not require congregational infrastructure or state legitimacy.
来自中国的证据与“无桥接的联结”逻辑相符。Brown 和 Tierney（2009）发现，宗教参与与中国成年人的生活满意度和幸福感呈正相关。Wei（2012）记录了中国基督徒的幸福感提升，并将之归因于家庭教会的支持网络。Chen 和 Williams（2016）在中国也发现了宗教与幸福感之间的正相关关系，但他们批判性地指出，其机制并非社会资本，而是宗教的私人和主观维度：信徒在快速的社会变革中维持了更高的社会地位感，这一路径完全是通过联结和意义建构而非公民参与来实现的。Luo 和 Chen（2021）利用中国家庭追踪调查数据进行潜在类别分析表明，预测更高生活满意度的是宗教身份的显著性，而非仅仅是宗教归属感，而且在那些宗教身份对其自我概念最为重要的人群中，这种影响更为显著。这些发现强化了这样一种观点：宗教在中国带来的福祉益处是通过个人意义和社区团结实现的，而这些恰恰是不需要教会基础设施或国家合法性的纽带机制。

The picture is not uniformly positive, however. Hu et al. (2017) found that Chinese Christians reported higher levels of depression compared with both religious nones and Buddhists, suggesting that religion’s marginal social position may impose psychological costs that partially offset its bonding benefits. Wei and Liu (2013) documented a curvilinear relationship between intrinsic religiosity and depression among rural Chinese women, with religiosity exacerbating the effects of certain life stressors rather than uniformly buffering them. These findings indicate that religion’s wellbeing effects in China are heterogeneous across traditions and outcomes, making it essential to test the bonding-without-bridging hypothesis empirically rather than assuming a uniformly positive wellbeing effect.
然而，情况并非完全乐观。Hu 等人（2017）发现，中国基督徒的抑郁水平高于无宗教信仰者和佛教徒，这表明宗教的边缘化社会地位可能会带来心理代价，部分抵消其带来的联结益处。Wei 和 Liu（2013）记录了中国农村女性内在宗教信仰与抑郁之间的曲线关系，宗教信仰会加剧某些生活压力源的影响，而非像以往那样起到缓冲作用。这些发现表明，宗教在中国的福祉影响因宗教传统和结果而异，因此，与其假设宗教具有普遍的积极福祉效应，不如对“联结而无桥梁”假设进行实证检验。

If religion in China generates bonding capital (enhancing personal wellbeing through meaning, community, and emotional support) without generating bridging capital (failing to cultivate generalized trust due to institutional constraints, state marginalization, and non-congregational organization), then the happiness outcome functions as a diagnostic test of the domain-specificity of religion’s social effects:
如果中国的宗教能够产生凝聚资本（通过意义、社群和情感支持来增强个人福祉），但无法产生桥梁资本（由于制度限制、国家边缘化和非教会组织等原因，未能培养普遍信任），那么幸福感结果就可以作为宗教社会影响领域特异性的诊断测试：

H5: Religious affiliation is positively associated with subjective happiness, consistent with religion generating bonding social capital even in the absence of bridging social capital.
H5：宗教信仰与主观幸福感呈正相关，这与宗教即使在缺乏桥梁社会资本的情况下也能产生凝聚型社会资本的观点相一致。

Finally, if the institutional alienation and marginalization mechanisms operate at the level of religious identity itself rather than through organizational channels, their effects should vary across social strata but should not be offset by political integration:
最后，如果制度性的疏离和边缘化机制是在宗教身份本身层面运作，而不是通过组织渠道运作，那么它们的影响应该会因社会阶层而异，但不应被政治融合所抵消：

H6: The negative trust association is concentrated among younger adults and is not moderated by CCP membership, suggesting that political integration does not buffer religion’s trust-eroding effects.
H6：负面信任关联集中在年轻成年人中，并且不受中共成员身份的影响，这表明政治一体化并不能缓冲宗教对信任的侵蚀作用。

The Present Study  本研究

To test these six hypotheses, I pool seven waves of the CGSS (2012–2023; NNN = 78,993) and deploy a multi-specification strategy. The analytic logic proceeds in three stages. Stage 1 establishes and characterizes the religion–trust association: OLS and ordered logit regressions test whether religion is negatively associated with trust (H1), whether the association varies by tradition (H2), and whether it intensifies with practice frequency (H3). Stage 2 probes mechanisms: causal mediation analysis decomposes the trust deficit into the institutional alienation pathway (fairness) and the marginalization pathway (health), testing which mechanism accounts for the larger share (H4). Stage 3 tests the alternative mechanism hypothesis: parallel models for happiness assess whether religion’s effects are domain-specific, undermining trust while enhancing wellbeing, as predicted by the bonding-without-bridging account (H5). If H5 is confirmed, it rules out the “uniformly negative” interpretation and supports the theoretical claim that religion in China generates bonding capital without bridging capital. Subgroup analyses by age, ethnicity, urbanicity, and CCP membership test H6. Because the cross-sectional association may be biased by reverse causality, omitted variables, or measurement error in the binary religion indicator, I supplement the main analysis with an extensive battery of robustness checks, including propensity score matching, inverse probability weighting, province fixed effects, and instrumental variable analysis using province-level religious infrastructure, to evaluate the causal plausibility of the observed patterns.
为了检验这六个假设，我汇总了 CGSS 的七波数据（2012-2023 年；样本量 NNN = 78,993），并采用多重模型设定策略。分析逻辑分为三个阶段。第一阶段建立并描述宗教与信任之间的关联：使用 OLS 回归和有序 logit 回归检验宗教是否与信任呈负相关（H1），这种关联是否因宗教传统而异（H2），以及这种关联是否会随着宗教实践频率的增加而增强（H3）。第二阶段探究其机制：因果中介分析将信任缺失分解为制度疏离路径（公平）和边缘化路径（健康），并检验哪种机制的贡献更大（H4）。第三阶段检验另一种机制假设：构建幸福感平行模型，评估宗教的影响是否具有领域特异性，即在提升幸福感的同时削弱信任，正如“无桥接的联结”理论所预测的那样（H5）。如果假设 H5 得到证实，则排除了“一致否定”的解释，并支持了“中国宗教产生凝聚资本而非桥梁资本”的理论主张。按年龄、民族、城镇化程度和中共党员身份进行亚组分析，检验假设 H6。由于横截面关联可能受到反向因果关系、遗漏变量或二元宗教指标测量误差的影响，我补充了一系列稳健性检验，包括倾向得分匹配、逆概率加权、省级固定效应以及使用省级宗教基础设施的工具变量分析，以评估观察到的模式的因果合理性。

Data and Methods  数据与方法

Data  数据

I use data from the Chinese General Social Survey (CGSS), China’s longest-running nationally representative repeated cross-sectional survey, conducted by the Renmin University of China (National Survey Research Center at Renmin University of China 2023; Bian and Li 2012). The CGSS employs a multistage stratified probability proportional-to-size (PPS) sampling design covering all provinces in mainland China (excluding Tibet). This study pools seven waves: 2012, 2013, 2015, 2017, 2018, 2021, and 2023, yielding a total analytic sample of NNN = 78,993 respondents after listwise imputation of missing values.
本文使用的数据来自中国人民大学开展的中国综合社会调查（CGSS），这是中国持续时间最长的全国代表性重复横断面调查（中国人民大学国家调查研究中心，2023；Bian 和 Li，2012）。CGSS 采用多阶段分层概率比例抽样（PPS）设计，覆盖中国大陆所有省份（西藏除外）。本研究汇总了 2012 年、2013 年、2015 年、2017 年、2018 年、2021 年和 2023 年的七次调查数据，在对缺失值进行列表插补后，最终分析样本量为 NNN = 78,993 名受访者。

Each wave independently samples from the Chinese adult population aged 18 and older, producing a pooled cross-sectional design. Because some respondents may appear in multiple waves, I use heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors (HC1) and include wave fixed effects in all models to account for period-level variation (White 1980; Wooldridge 2010).
每一轮调查均独立地从 18 岁及以上的中国成年人口中抽取样本，从而形成一个合并的横截面设计。由于部分受访者可能出现在多轮调查中，我使用异方差稳健标准误（HC1），并在所有模型中纳入轮次固定效应，以解释时期层面的差异（White 1980; Wooldridge 2010）。

Measures  措施

Generalized trust (outcome). The CGSS asks respondents: “Generally speaking, do you agree that most people in this society can be trusted?” Responses range from 1 (“strongly disagree”) to 5 (“strongly agree”). The sample mean is 3.49 (SDSDSD = 1.01). Although this item is ordinal, I treat it as continuous in OLS models following standard practice in the trust literature (Delhey and Newton 2005; Paxton 2002) and confirm results with ordered logistic regression.
普遍信任（结果）。CGSS 询问受访者：“总的来说，您是否认为这个社会中的大多数人值得信任？” 回答范围从 1（“非常不同意”）到 5（“非常同意”）。样本均值为 3.49（ SDSDSD = 1.01）。尽管该项目是有序变量，但根据信任文献中的标准做法（Delhey 和 Newton 2005；Paxton 2002），我在 OLS 模型中将其视为连续变量，并使用有序逻辑回归验证结果。

Happiness (secondary outcome). Respondents rate their overall happiness on a 5-point scale from “very unhappy” (1) to “very happy” (5). The sample mean is 3.86 (SDSDSD = 0.83).
幸福感（次要结果）。受访者使用 5 分制量表评价他们的整体幸福感，从“非常不幸福”（1）到“非常幸福”（5）。样本均值为 3.86（ SDSDSD = 0.83）。

Religious affiliation (key predictor). The CGSS asks respondents about their religious beliefs. The coding format varies across waves: in 2012–2017, dummy variables for each religion were used, while in 2018–2023, a single categorical variable records tradition. I harmonize these into a consistent classification: no religion (reference), Buddhism, Taoism, folk religion, Islam, Catholicism, Protestantism, and other. I construct a binary indicator (has_religionhas\_religionhas_religion = 1 for any religious affiliation, 0 for none) as well as tradition-specific dummies. Folk religion (minjian xinyang) in the CGSS encompasses Chinese popular religious practices (ancestor worship, belief in local deities, fortune-telling, and fengshui) that fall outside the five officially recognized religions. Taoism and folk religion are combined in some models due to the small cell size for Taoism alone (NNN = 209) and their historical overlap in Chinese religious practice (Chau 2006), though the two traditions are conceptually distinct: institutional Taoism has organized clergy and liturgy, while folk religion encompasses diffuse popular practices. Separate estimates are qualitatively similar but imprecise for Taoism alone given the small cell size. Christianity combines Catholicism (NNN = 160) and Protestantism (NNN = 1,348) for parsimony, though sensitivity analyses treating them separately yield similar results. Across the pooled sample, 10.8% (NNN = 8,557) report a religious affiliation, with Buddhism (5.0%), Islam (1.8%), Protestantism (1.7%), and folk religion (1.7%) as the largest traditions. An important caveat: in the Chinese context, the binary religion variable captures self-reported religious identity rather than religious belief or practice per se. Because the CGSS is administered by Renmin University under government auspices, declaring a religious affiliation on this survey is itself a social act that may select for individuals who are more committed to or open about their religious identity. This means the variable partially captures willingness to claim a marginalized identity on a government-affiliated instrument, a selection mechanism that should be kept in mind when interpreting the results.
宗教信仰（关键预测变量）。中国社会调查（CGSS）询问受访者的宗教信仰。不同调查阶段的编码方式有所不同：2012-2017 年，每个宗教都使用虚拟变量；而 2018-2023 年，则使用一个单一的分类变量来记录宗教传统。我将这些变量统一归类为：无宗教信仰（参照组）、佛教、道教、民间信仰、伊斯兰教、天主教、基督教新教和其他。我构建了一个二元指标（ has_religionhas\_religionhas_religion = 1 表示任何宗教信仰，0 表示无宗教信仰），以及特定于宗教传统的虚拟变量。CGSS 中的民间信仰（民教）涵盖了五大官方认可宗教之外的中国民间宗教习俗（例如祭祖、地方神灵信仰、算命和风水）。由于道教样本量较小（ NNN = 209），且道教和民间宗教在中国宗教实践中存在历史重叠（Chau 2006），因此在一些模型中将二者合并。尽管道教和民间宗教在概念上截然不同：道教是制度化的，拥有组织严密的教士和礼仪，而民间宗教则涵盖了分散的民间实践。由于样本量较小，单独对道教进行估计的结果在性质上相似，但不够精确。为了简化模型，基督教合并了天主教（ NNN = 160）和基督教新教（ NNN = 1,348），但分别进行敏感性分析的结果也相似。在所有受访者中，10.8%（ NNN = 8,557）的人表示有宗教信仰，其中佛教（5.0%）、伊斯兰教（1.8%）、基督教新教（1.7%）和民间宗教（1.7%）是最大的宗教信仰群体。需要特别注意的是：在中国语境下，二元宗教变量反映的是自我报告的宗教身份，而不是宗教信仰或实践本身。 由于中国人民社会调查（CGSS）由人民大学在政府支持下实施，因此在该调查中申报宗教信仰本身就是一种社会行为，可能会筛选出那些对自身宗教信仰更加虔诚或公开表达宗教身份的个体。这意味着该变量部分反映了受访者在政府支持的调查工具中表明自身边缘化身份的意愿，在解读调查结果时应考虑到这种选择机制。

Religious practice intensity. The CGSS measures the frequency of religious activities on a 9-point scale from “never” to “several times per week.” I construct a four-category ordinal variable: no practice (reference), yearly practice, monthly practice, and weekly or more frequent practice. Additionally, I create a binary active_practiceactive\_practiceactive_practice indicator (any practice more than once per year) and a continuous practice variable for interaction models.
宗教活动强度。CGSS 使用 9 分制量表（从“从不”到“每周数次”）来衡量宗教活动的频率。我构建了一个四分类有序变量：无宗教活动（参照组）、每年一次、每月一次、每周一次或更频繁。此外，我还创建了一个二元指标 active_practiceactive\_practiceactive_practice （每年进行超过一次的任何宗教活动）和一个用于交互模型的连续宗教活动变量。

Mediating variables. Perceived social fairness is measured with the item “Overall, do you think current society is fair?” (1–5 scale; MMM = 3.17, SDSDSD = 1.04). Self-rated health is measured as “How would you rate your current health status?” (1–5; MMM = 3.53, SDSDSD = 1.08). Both variables are treated as potential mediators linking religion to trust.
中介变量。感知社会公平性通过“总体而言，您认为当前的社会公平吗？”这一问题来衡量（1-5 分制； MMM = 3.17， SDSDSD = 1.04）。自评健康状况通过“您如何评价自己目前的健康状况？”这一问题来衡量（1-5 分制； MMM = 3.53， SDSDSD = 1.08）。这两个变量都被视为连接宗教与信任的潜在中介变量。

Control variables. All models adjust for female gender (51.0%), age in years (MMM = 49.98, SDSDSD = 16.83) and age-squared, years of education (MMM = 9.08, SDSDSD = 5.12), log household income (MMM = 8.97, SDSDSD = 4.05), CCP membership (12.0%), Han ethnicity (92.1%), urban hukou (54.5%), and marital status (74.8% currently married). CCP membership is coded as a binary indicator for formal Chinese Communist Party membership, excluding Communist Youth League members and democratic party affiliates. This narrow coding (12.0% of the sample) captures the most meaningful form of institutional integration into the party-state’s organizational infrastructure, the mechanism of theoretical interest (see Supplementary Materials, Section S1.2, for details). Descriptive statistics by religious affiliation are presented in Table [tab:descriptives].
控制变量。所有模型均调整了以下变量：女性（51.0%）、年龄（ MMM = 49.98， SDSDSD = 16.83）及其平方、受教育年限（ MMM = 9.08， SDSDSD = 5.12）、家庭收入对数（ MMM = 8.97， SDSDSD = 4.05）、中共党员身份（12.0%）、汉族（92.1%）、城镇户口（54.5%）以及婚姻状况（74.8% 目前已婚）。中共党员身份被编码为一个二元指标，代表正式的中国共产党党员身份，不包括共青团员和民主党成员。这种狭义的编码（占样本的 12.0%）捕捉到了融入党国组织架构的最有意义的制度整合形式，即理论关注的机制（详见补充材料 S1.2 节）。按宗教信仰划分的描述性统计数据见表[tab:descriptives]。

Analytic Strategy  分析策略

The analysis proceeds in several steps designed to establish the religion–trust association, probe its mechanisms, assess heterogeneity, and evaluate robustness. I begin with OLS regressions of generalized trust on a binary religion indicator with the full set of controls and wave fixed effects (Model 1), then add a religion×\times×active practice interaction (Model 2), disaggregate by religious tradition (Model 3), and examine practice intensity (Model 4). These specifications are confirmed with ordered logistic regression to ensure that findings are not driven by the assumption of interval-level measurement (Supplementary Materials, Table S2). Parallel models for happiness test whether religion’s effects are domain-specific.
本分析分几个步骤进行，旨在建立宗教与信任之间的关联，探究其机制，评估异质性，并检验结果的稳健性。首先，我使用 OLS 回归模型，以二元宗教指标为自变量，以广义信任为因变量，并纳入所有控制变量和波次固定效应（模型 1）。然后，我加入宗教 ×\times× 与积极实践的交互项（模型 2），按宗教传统进行细分（模型 3），并考察实践强度（模型 4）。这些模型设定均通过有序 logistic 回归进行验证，以确保研究结果并非由区间尺度测量假设所驱动（见补充材料表 S2）。此外，我还构建了幸福感平行模型，以检验宗教的影响是否具有领域特异性。

To investigate mechanisms, I conduct causal mediation analysis following the potential-outcomes framework of Imai et al. (2010), estimating the Average Causal Mediation Effect (ACME) and Average Direct Effect (ADE) for each proposed mediator (fairness, health) using quasi-Bayesian simulation with 1,000 draws. Heterogeneity is assessed through both subgroup models (stratified by urban/rural hukou, Han/minority ethnicity, CCP membership, and age group) and formal interaction models. Robustness checks include province fixed effects, propensity score matching, inverse probability weighting, and the E-value for sensitivity to unmeasured confounding (VanderWeele 2017), with full results reported in the Supplementary Materials.
为了探究其机制，我遵循 Imai 等人（2010）的潜在结果框架进行因果中介分析，利用准贝叶斯模拟（1000 次抽样）估计每个提出的中介变量（公平、健康）的平均因果中介效应（ACME）和平均直接效应（ADE）。异质性评估通过亚组模型（按城乡户口、汉族/少数民族、党员身份和年龄组分层）和正式交互模型进行。稳健性检验包括省份固定效应、倾向得分匹配、逆概率加权以及用于检验未测量混杂因素敏感性的 E 值（VanderWeele 2017），完整结果见补充材料。

Because the OLS estimates may be biased by reverse causality, omitted variables, or measurement error in the binary religion indicator, I supplement the main analysis with two-stage least squares (2SLS) using two complementary instruments: province-level leave-one-out religiosity, which captures the local religious environment without mechanical dependence on the individual’s own affiliation (Iannaccone 1991), and religious sites per 10,000 population from the Online Spiritual Atlas of China (OSAC; Yang 2018), which records 72,655 sites from the 2004 National Economic Census across 31 provinces, capturing historical religious “supply” (Finke and Stark 1998). Both instruments are strong (first-stage FFF = 4,679 and 825, respectively, far exceeding the Stock and Yogo (2005) threshold of 10). Because both instruments vary at the province level, I report standard errors clustered at the CGSS province-code level (79 clusters) alongside heteroskedasticity-robust (HC1) SEs. Full technical details, including exclusion restriction arguments, monotonicity assumptions, and diagnostic tests, are reported in Supplementary Materials, Section S10.
由于 OLS 估计可能受到反向因果关系、遗漏变量或二元宗教指标测量误差的影响，我使用两个互补的工具变量，通过两阶段最小二乘法（2SLS）对主要分析进行补充：一是省级留一法宗教信仰度，它反映了当地的宗教环境，而不依赖于个人的宗教信仰（Iannaccone 1991）；二是来自中国在线精神地图集（OSAC；Yang 2018）的每万人宗教场所数量，该地图集记录了 2004 年全国经济普查中 31 个省份的 72,655 个宗教场所，反映了历史上的宗教“供给”（Finke 和 Stark 1998）。这两个工具变量都很强（第一阶段 FFF 分别为 4,679 和 825，远超 Stock 和 Yogo（2005）设定的 10 的阈值）。由于两种工具变量均存在省级差异，我报告了按 CGSS 省级代码聚类的标准误差（共 79 个聚类）以及异方差稳健（HC1）标准误差。完整的技术细节，包括排除限制论证、单调性假设和诊断检验，详见补充材料 S10 节。

Missing data are handled through multiple imputation using the missRanger algorithm (Steiner 2020) with predictive mean matching (kkk = 5). All standard errors are heteroskedasticity-robust (HC1), and variance inflation factors are below 1.2 for all predictors (Supplementary Materials, Table S5). All analyses are conducted in R (version 4.3) using the ivreg, sandwich, mediation, and MatchIt packages.
缺失数据采用 missRanger 算法（Steiner 2020）进行多重插补，并采用预测均值匹配（ kkk = 5）。所有标准误差均为异方差稳健标准误差 (HC1)，所有预测变量的方差膨胀因子均低于 1.2（见补充材料表 S5）。所有分析均在 R 语言（版本 4.3）中使用 ivreg 、 sandwich 、 mediation 和 MatchIt 程序包完成。

Results  结果

Descriptive Patterns  描述性模式

Table [tab:descriptives] presents descriptive statistics for the full sample and by religious affiliation. Religious respondents comprise 10.8% of the pooled sample (NNN = 8,557), with Buddhism as the largest tradition (5.0%), followed by Islam (1.8%), Protestantism (1.7%), and folk religion (1.7%). Consistent with prior research on China’s religious demography (Yang 2010; Lu and Sheng 2024), religious adherents are disproportionately female (60.6% vs. 49.8%), older (MMM = 51.88 vs. 49.75), less educated (MMM = 8.43 vs. 9.16 years), and more likely to belong to ethnic minorities (22.8% vs. 6.1%).
表[tab:descriptives]呈现了完整样本和按宗教信仰划分的描述性统计数据。宗教信仰者占总样本的 10.8%（ NNN = 8,557），其中佛教信徒最多（5.0%），其次是伊斯兰教（1.8%）、基督教新教（1.7%）和民间宗教（1.7%）。与以往关于中国宗教人口统计的研究（Yang 2010; Lu and Sheng 2024）一致，宗教信徒中女性比例较高（60.6% vs. 49.8%），年龄较大（ MMM = 51.88 vs. 49.75），受教育程度较低（ MMM = 8.43 vs. 9.16 年），且更有可能属于少数民族（22.8% vs. 6.1%）。

Notably, 76.2% of religious respondents report active religious practice (defined as participating in religious activities more than once per year), compared to 7.9% of non-religious respondents, the latter figure capturing individuals who may engage in folk rituals (e.g., burning incense at a temple during Spring Festival) without identifying as religious, a well-documented feature of China’s “diffused” religious landscape (Fan 2011). The mean trust score is marginally lower among religious respondents (3.45 vs. 3.49), a small difference that nonetheless proves statistically significant (ttt-test p<.001p < .001p<.001) given the pooled sample size. In substantive terms, this raw difference of 0.04 points on a 5-point scale translates to approximately 4% of a standard deviation, small but socially meaningful when aggregated over a population of tens of millions. Happiness levels are indistinguishable across groups (MMM = 3.86 for both), while religious respondents report somewhat more frequent depression (MMM = 3.70 vs. 3.85; note that higher scores indicate less depression on this reverse-coded scale). These raw descriptive patterns preview the multivariate finding that religion’s trust and wellbeing effects operate in opposite directions.
值得注意的是，76.2%的宗教受访者表示积极参与宗教活动（定义为每年参与宗教活动超过一次），而非宗教受访者中这一比例仅为 7.9%。后者涵盖了那些可能参与民间仪式（例如，春节期间在寺庙烧香）但不认同自己是宗教人士的人，这是中国“分散式”宗教格局的一个显著特征（Fan 2011）。宗教受访者的平均信任度得分略低于非宗教受访者（3.45 vs. 3.49），尽管差异很小，但考虑到样本总量，这一差异仍具有统计学意义（ ttt -test p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）。从实质上看，在 5 分制量表上，这 0.04 分的原始差异相当于约 4%的标准差，虽然很小，但考虑到数千万人口的规模，这一差异具有重要的社会意义。各组的幸福感水平没有显著差异（ MMM = 3.86），但有宗教信仰的受访者报告的抑郁发生率略高（ MMM = 3.70 vs. 3.85；请注意，在此反向计分量表中，分数越高表示抑郁程度越低）。这些初步的描述性模式预示着多元分析的结果，即宗教信仰对信任和幸福感的影响方向相反。

Main Results: Religion and Trust
主要结果：宗教与信任

Table [tab:main_trust] presents OLS estimates of the association between religion and generalized trust. In Model 1, the binary religion indicator carries a coefficient of b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 (SESESE = 0.012, p<.001p < .001p<.001), indicating that religious individuals score approximately 0.05 points lower on the 5-point trust scale, net of demographic and socioeconomic controls. Although modest in magnitude, this effect is highly statistically significant and runs counter to the Putnamesque expectation. For comparison, it is slightly larger than the gender gap (females score 0.022 points lower) and approximately 84% the size of the marriage premium (b=0.056b = 0.056b=0.056, p<.001p < .001p<.001).
表[tab:main_trust]呈现了宗教信仰与总体信任之间关联的 OLS 估计值。在模型 1 中，二元宗教信仰指标的系数为 b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 （ SESESE = 0.012， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），表明在控制了人口统计和社会经济因素后，有宗教信仰的人在 5 分制信任量表上的得分比无宗教信仰的人低约 0.05 分。尽管这种影响幅度不大，但具有高度统计显著性，并且与普特纳姆式的预期相反。作为比较，它略大于性别差异（女性得分低 0.022 分），约为婚姻溢价的 84%（ b=0.056b = 0.056b=0.056 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）。

Model 2 adds a religion×\times×active practice interaction to test whether the trust penalty is moderated by engagement intensity. The interaction term is not statistically significant (b=−0.008b = -0.008b=−0.008, p>.10p > .10p>.10), suggesting that the trust deficit characterizes religious adherents regardless of whether they actively practice, although the main effect of “has religion” remains negative and significant (b=−0.055b = -0.055b=−0.055, p<.05p < .05p<.05).
模型 2 加入了宗教信仰 ×\times× 积极实践的交互项，以检验信任惩罚是否会受到参与程度的调节。交互项不具有统计学意义（ b=−0.008b = -0.008b=−0.008 ， p>.10p > .10p>.10 ），表明信任缺陷是宗教信徒的特征，无论他们是否积极实践宗教信仰，尽管“有宗教信仰”的主效应仍然为负且显著（ b=−0.055b = -0.055b=−0.055 ， p<.05p < .05p<.05 ）。

Model 3 disaggregates by religious tradition. The negative association is statistically significant for Taoism/folk religion (b=−0.087b = -0.087b=−0.087, p<.001p < .001p<.001), Christianity (b=−0.057b = -0.057b=−0.057, p<.05p < .05p<.05), and Buddhism (b=−0.034b = -0.034b=−0.034, p<.05p < .05p<.05), but not significant for Islam (b=−0.031b = -0.031b=−0.031, p>.10p > .10p>.10) or other religions. The particularly strong negative association for Taoism/folk religion is noteworthy, as these traditions are the most “diffused” and least institutionally organized of China’s recognized religions (Fan 2011; Chau 2006), suggesting that the trust penalty is not driven by congregational dynamics but by something more fundamental about the social position of religious identity in China.
模型 3 按宗教传统进行细分。道教/民间宗教（ b=−0.087b = -0.087b=−0.087 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）、基督教（ b=−0.057b = -0.057b=−0.057 ， p<.05p < .05p<.05 ）和佛教（ b=−0.034b = -0.034b=−0.034 ， p<.05p < .05p<.05 ）的负相关性具有统计学意义，但伊斯兰教（ b=−0.031b = -0.031b=−0.031 ， p>.10p > .10p>.10 ）或其他宗教的负相关性不显著。道教/民间宗教的负相关性尤为显著，这一点值得注意，因为这些传统是中国公认宗教中最“分散”且制度组织最不完善的（Fan 2011; Chau 2006），这表明信任惩罚并非由信众动态驱动，而是源于中国宗教身份的社会地位等更根本的因素。

Model 4 replaces the tradition dummies with practice intensity categories. Yearly and monthly practice carry coefficients indistinguishable from zero, but weekly or more frequent practice is associated with substantially lower trust (b=−0.111b = -0.111b=−0.111, SESESE = 0.032, p<.001p < .001p<.001). This dose–response pattern is consistent with H3 and suggests that it is the most deeply engaged religious practitioners, those whose religious identity most centrally organizes their social world, who exhibit the greatest trust deficit.
模型 4 用实践强度类别取代了传统虚拟变量。年度和月度实践的系数与零无显著差异，但每周或更频繁的实践与显著降低的信任度相关（ b=−0.111b = -0.111b=−0.111 ， SESESE = 0.032， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）。这种剂量-反应模式与假设 H3 一致，表明那些宗教信仰最深入的信徒，即那些宗教认同在其社会生活中占据核心地位的人，表现出最大的信任缺失。

The ordered logistic regression (Supplementary Materials, Table S2) confirms the OLS results: the religion coefficient is b=−0.075b = -0.075b=−0.075 (p<.001p < .001p<.001), indicating that religious affiliation is associated with lower odds of being in a higher trust category. The consistency across OLS and ordered logit specifications provides confidence that the finding is not an artifact of measurement assumptions.
有序逻辑回归（见补充材料表 S2）证实了 OLS 的结果：宗教系数为 b=−0.075b = -0.075b=−0.075 （ p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），表明宗教信仰与较低的信任度相关。OLS 和有序 logit 模型结果的一致性表明，该发现并非测量假设所致。

Among the control variables, CCP membership is a strong positive predictor of trust (b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179, p<.001p < .001p<.001), consistent with the institutional integration thesis: formal CCP members are more deeply embedded in the party-state’s organizational infrastructure, and their higher generalized trust likely reflects the political socialization, social status, and institutional confidence that party membership confers (Chen and Lu 2007). Being married is positively associated with trust (b=0.056b = 0.056b=0.056, p<.001p < .001p<.001), consistent with the relational security thesis in the trust literature (Delhey and Newton 2005). Urban hukou holders report higher trust (b=0.048b = 0.048b=0.048, p<.001p < .001p<.001), while Han ethnicity is negatively associated (b=−0.053b = -0.053b=−0.053, p<.001p < .001p<.001), a pattern that warrants further investigation but may reflect greater exposure to the competitive pressures of market reform among the Han majority.
在控制变量中，中共党员身份是信任度的强正向预测因子（ b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），这与制度整合理论相符：正式的中共党员更深地融入党国组织架构，他们较高的普遍信任度可能反映了党员身份所带来的政治社会化、社会地位和制度信心（Chen and Lu 2007）。已婚与信任度呈正相关（ b=0.056b = 0.056b=0.056 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），这与信任文献中的关系安全理论相符（Delhey and Newton 2005）。城市户口持有者报告的信任度更高（ b=0.048b = 0.048b=0.048 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），而汉族身份则与信任度呈负相关（ b=−0.053b = -0.053b=−0.053 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），这一模式值得进一步研究，但可能反映了汉族人口在市场改革的竞争压力下承受着更大的压力。

The overall model R2R^2R2 is 0.030, which is modest but consistent with the typically low explanatory power of individual-level trust regressions in large-scale surveys (Delhey and Newton 2005; Alesina and Ferrara 2002). Trust is a diffuse social orientation with many determinants, and a single religion variable should not be expected to explain substantial variance.
整体模型 R2R^2R2 为 0.030，虽然数值不高，但与大规模调查中个体层面信任回归通常较低的解释力相符（Delhey 和 Newton 2005；Alesina 和 Ferrara 2002）。信任是一种受多种因素影响的弥散性社会取向，因此不应期望单一的宗教变量能够解释显著的方差。

Figure 1 visualizes the tradition-specific and practice-intensity coefficients with 95% confidence intervals, showing that all point estimates are negative, with the widest confidence interval for the “other” category (reflecting its small cell size of NNN = 99) and the largest negative estimate for weekly-or-more practitioners. The visual pattern underscores both the consistency of the negative direction across traditions and the meaningful variation in magnitude.
图 1 以 95% 置信区间可视化了特定传统和练习强度系数，结果表明所有点估计值均为负值，“其他”类别的置信区间最宽（反映其单元格大小 NNN = 99），而每周练习一次或以上的练习者的负估计值最大。该图例既突显了不同传统中负方向的一致性，也强调了其幅度上的显著差异。

Mediation Analysis: Institutional Alienation vs. Marginalization
中介分析：制度性疏离与边缘化

Having established that religion is negatively associated with trust, I now test why. H4 predicts that the trust deficit is partially mediated by perceived social fairness (institutional alienation pathway) and self-rated health (marginalization pathway), with fairness accounting for the larger share. Table [tab:mediation] presents the causal mediation analysis following the potential-outcomes framework of Imai et al. (2010). Panel A shows that religious affiliation is significantly associated with lower perceived fairness (b=−0.062b = -0.062b=−0.062, p<.001p < .001p<.001) and poorer self-rated health (b=−0.046b = -0.046b=−0.046, p<.001p < .001p<.001). When both mediators are included in the trust equation, the religion coefficient attenuates from −0.047-0.047−0.047 to −0.029-0.029−0.029 (p<.05p < .05p<.05), a 38% reduction.
既然已经确定宗教信仰与信任呈负相关，接下来我将检验其原因。假设 H4 预测，信任缺失部分由感知到的社会公平（制度疏离路径）和自评健康状况（边缘化路径）中介，其中公平感所占比例更大。表[tab:mediation]根据 Imai 等人（2010）的潜在结果框架呈现了因果中介分析。表 A 显示，宗教信仰与较低的感知公平感（ b=−0.062b = -0.062b=−0.062 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）和较差的自评健康状况（ b=−0.046b = -0.046b=−0.046 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）显著相关。当将这两个中介变量都纳入信任方程时，宗教信仰的系数从 −0.047-0.047−0.047 减弱至 −0.029-0.029−0.029 （ p<.05p < .05p<.05 ），降低了 38%。

Panel B presents the key causal mediation estimates. The Average Causal Mediation Effect (ACME) through perceived fairness is −0.019-0.019−0.019 (95% CI: −0.025-0.025−0.025, −0.011-0.011−0.011; p<.001p < .001p<.001), accounting for 39.6% of the total statistical association. Fairness is a powerful predictor of trust in its own right (b=0.296b = 0.296b=0.296, p<.001p < .001p<.001), consistent with Rothstein and Stolle (2005)’s ((2005)) institutional theory holding that generalized trust is a downstream consequence of confidence in the fairness of social institutions. The ACME through self-rated health, by contrast, is much smaller: −0.003-0.003−0.003 (95% CI: −0.004-0.004−0.004, −0.001-0.001−0.001; p<.001p < .001p<.001), accounting for only 5.7% of the total association. The Average Direct Effect (ADE) remains statistically significant in both models (p<.01p < .01p<.01), indicating that substantial portions of the religion–trust association operate through pathways not captured by fairness or health.
表 B 列出了关键的因果中介效应估计值。通过感知公平性产生的平均因果中介效应（ACME）为 −0.019-0.019−0.019 （95% CI： −0.025-0.025−0.025 ， −0.011-0.011−0.011 ； p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），占总统计关联的 39.6%。公平性本身就是信任的强有力预测因子（ b=0.296b = 0.296b=0.296 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），这与 Rothstein 和 Stolle（2005）的制度理论相一致，该理论认为普遍信任是对社会制度公平性信心的下游结果。相比之下，通过自评健康产生的 ACME 要小得多： −0.003-0.003−0.003 （95% CI： −0.004-0.004−0.004 ， −0.001-0.001−0.001 ； p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），仅占总关联的 5.7%。平均直接效应（ADE）在两个模型中均保持统计显著性（ p<.01p < .01p<.01 ），表明宗教与信任关联的很大一部分是通过公平性或健康无法捕捉到的路径发挥作用的。

These results support H4 and confirm the predicted asymmetry: the institutional alienation pathway (fairness) accounts for a share of the trust deficit nearly seven times larger than the marginalization pathway (health). A caveat is warranted: the fairness item asks about “current society” in general rather than state institutions specifically, so the mediation estimate captures broad perceptions of social unfairness rather than institutional alienation per se. Religious individuals may perceive society as less fair for reasons beyond state regulation, including relative deprivation, economic marginality, or cultural distance from the secular mainstream. Nonetheless, the fairness pathway is consistent with the institutional alienation mechanism and substantially more powerful than the health pathway, suggesting that the religion–trust deficit is rooted in perceptions of the social order rather than compositional health disadvantage. A formal sensitivity analysis (Supplementary Materials, Section S9) confirms that the ACME through fairness is robust to moderate violations of the sequential ignorability assumption, remaining significant as long as the unobserved mediator–outcome error correlation is below ρ≈0.30\rho \approx 0.30ρ≈0.30.
这些结果支持假设 H4，并证实了预测的不对称性：制度疏离路径（公平性）对信任赤字的解释力几乎是边缘化路径（健康）的七倍。需要注意的是，公平性指标询问的是“当前社会”的整体情况，而非特指国家机构，因此中介效应估计反映的是人们对社会不公的普遍感知，而非制度疏离本身。宗教人士可能出于国家监管之外的其他原因，例如相对剥夺感、经济边缘化或与世俗主流文化的文化距离，而认为社会不够公平。尽管如此，公平性路径与制度疏离机制相符，且其效力远高于健康路径，这表明宗教信仰导致的信任赤字根源于对社会秩序的感知，而非构成性的健康劣势。一项正式的敏感性分析（见补充材料 S9 节）证实，通过公平性因素的 ACME 模型对序列可忽略性假设的轻微违反具有稳健性，只要未观察到的中介变量与结果变量之间的误差相关性低于 ρ≈0.30\rho \approx 0.30ρ≈0.30 ，该模型就仍然显著。

Alternative Mechanism Test: Religion and Happiness
替代机制检验：宗教与幸福

Having established that religion undermines trust and identified institutional alienation as the primary mediating pathway, I now test the alternative mechanism hypothesis (H5). If religion in China functions solely as a source of social disadvantage, its effects should be uniformly negative across outcomes. If, instead, religion generates bonding capital without bridging capital, it should undermine trust while simultaneously enhancing happiness.
既然已经确定宗教会削弱信任，并且制度疏离是主要的中介路径，那么我现在要检验另一种机制假设（H5）。如果宗教在中国仅仅起到社会劣势的作用，那么它对所有结果的影响应该是一致的负面的。相反，如果宗教能够产生凝聚资本而没有产生桥梁资本，那么它应该在削弱信任的同时提升幸福感。

Table [tab:happiness] presents OLS estimates of the association between religion and happiness, paralleling the trust models. In Model 1, the binary religion indicator carries a positive coefficient (b=0.024b = 0.024b=0.024, SESESE = 0.010, p<.05p < .05p<.05), indicating that religious individuals report modestly but significantly higher happiness, net of demographic and socioeconomic controls. This finding stands in direct contrast to the trust result (b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047) and rules out the “uniformly negative” interpretation: religion is not simply disadvantageous in China but rather produces opposing effects across different social domains.
表[tab:happiness]呈现了宗教与幸福感之间关联的 OLS 估计值，与信任模型相对应。在模型 1 中，二元宗教指标的系数为正（ b=0.024b = 0.024b=0.024 ， SESESE = 0.010， p<.05p < .05p<.05 ），表明在控制了人口统计和社会经济因素后，有宗教信仰的人的幸福感略高但显著更高。这一发现与信任的结果（ b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 ）截然相反，并排除了“普遍负面”的解释：宗教在中国并非总是不利的，而是在不同的社会领域产生相反的影响。

Disaggregating by tradition (Model 3) reveals striking heterogeneity. Islam is strongly and positively associated with happiness (b=0.168b = 0.168b=0.168, SESESE = 0.026, p<.001p < .001p<.001), the largest effect of any tradition and one that coexists with Islam’s non-significant trust coefficient, making it the clearest empirical example of bonding-without-bridging: robust communal solidarity enhances personal wellbeing without generating generalized trust. The happiness premium for Muslims is consistent with the strong communal identity and mutual support networks characteristic of China’s Hui Muslim communities (Yang 2011). Taoism/folk religion, by contrast, is negatively associated with happiness (b=−0.078b = -0.078b=−0.078, SESESE = 0.022, p<.001p < .001p<.001), making it the only tradition with negative effects on both trust and happiness. This double deficit suggests that folk religious identity in contemporary China may lack even the bonding capital that other traditions provide, consistent with the diffuse, non-congregational character of folk religious practice (Fan 2011; Chau 2006). Buddhism and Christianity show small positive but non-significant happiness coefficients.
按传统进行细分（模型 3）揭示了显著的异质性。伊斯兰教与幸福感呈显著正相关（ b=0.168b = 0.168b=0.168 ， SESESE = 0.026， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），这是所有传统中影响最大的，并且与伊斯兰教不显著的信任系数并存，使其成为“联结但不产生桥梁”这一现象最清晰的实证例证：强大的社群团结提升了个人幸福感，却并未产生普遍的信任。穆斯林的幸福溢价与中国回族穆斯林社群特有的强烈的社群认同感和互助网络相一致（Yang 2011）。相比之下，道教/民间宗教与幸福感呈负相关（ b=−0.078b = -0.078b=−0.078 ， SESESE = 0.022， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），使其成为唯一对信任和幸福感均产生负面影响的传统。这种双重缺失表明，当代中国的民间宗教认同可能甚至缺乏其他传统所提供的凝聚力，这与民间宗教实践分散、非集会的特征相符（Fan 2011; Chau 2006）。佛教和基督教的幸福系数虽为正值，但并不显著。

The practice intensity results (Model 4) reveal a pattern that mirrors and inverts the trust findings: weekly or more frequent practitioners report substantially higher happiness (b=0.143b = 0.143b=0.143, SESESE = 0.026, p<.001p < .001p<.001), whereas this same group shows the largest trust deficit (b=−0.111b = -0.111b=−0.111). The most deeply engaged religious practitioners thus experience the strongest bonding benefits (higher happiness) alongside the strongest bridging costs (lower trust), consistent with the hypothesis that intensive religious engagement simultaneously deepens in-group solidarity and widens the gap between religious communities and the broader society.
实践强度结果（模型 4）揭示了一种与信任度结果相呼应又相反的模式：每周或更频繁进行宗教活动的人报告的幸福感显著更高（ b=0.143b = 0.143b=0.143 ， SESESE = 0.026， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），但同一群体却表现出最大的信任度缺失（ b=−0.111b = -0.111b=−0.111 ）。因此，宗教活动参与度最高的人体验到最强的联结收益（更高的幸福感），同时也承受着最强的沟通成本（更低的信任度），这与以下假设相符：密集的宗教活动既加深了群体内部的团结，又扩大了宗教团体与更广泛社会之间的鸿沟。

The divergence between trust and happiness effects supports H5 and the bonding-without-bridging theoretical framework developed in Section 2.4. Religious involvement in China provides personal psychological resources, including existential meaning, communal solidarity, and a sense of identity, without cultivating the generalized orientation toward strangers that constitutes social trust. In the Chinese context, this distinction may be particularly sharp: religious communities provide emotional sustenance and spiritual resources precisely because they operate at some distance from the state-dominated civic sphere, and the same institutional marginality that erodes trust (through the fairness mechanism documented above) does not prevent religion from delivering bonding benefits.
信任与幸福感效应之间的差异支持了假设 H5 以及 2.4 节中提出的“无桥接的联结”理论框架。在中国，宗教活动能够提供个人心理资源，包括存在意义、社群凝聚力和身份认同感，但并不像社会信任那样培养对陌生人的普遍倾向。在中国语境下，这种区别可能尤为显著：宗教团体之所以能够提供情感支持和精神资源，恰恰是因为它们与国家主导的公民领域保持着一定的距离；而正是这种制度边缘性（通过上文所述的公平机制）削弱了信任，却并未阻止宗教带来联结方面的益处。

Temporal Stability  时间稳定性

To assess whether the religion–trust association is stable across survey periods, I estimate wave-specific models (Figure 2). The coefficient for “has religion” is negative in all seven waves and statistically significant in four: 2012 (b=−0.134b = -0.134b=−0.134, p<.001p < .001p<.001), 2013 (b=−0.068b = -0.068b=−0.068, p=.028p = .028p=.028), 2015 (b=−0.065b = -0.065b=−0.065, p=.036p = .036p=.036), and 2017 (b=−0.093b = -0.093b=−0.093, p=.003p = .003p=.003). The three post-2017 waves (2018, 2021, 2023) show negative point estimates that do not reach conventional significance. This temporal pattern, with robust effects in the 2012–2017 period and attenuated effects thereafter, may reflect changes in China’s religious regulatory environment following the 2018 revision of the Regulations on Religious Affairs (Zongjiao Shiwu Tiaoli), which clarified the legal status of recognized religious organizations and may have reduced the sense of institutional marginality among religious adherents. Alternatively, it could reflect compositional shifts in the CGSS sampling frame or secular trends in religious identification. The pooled estimate, which uses wave fixed effects to absorb level differences across survey periods, remains highly significant (b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047, p<.001p < .001p<.001). Full wave-specific coefficients are reported in Supplementary Materials, Table S6.
为了评估宗教信仰与信任之间的关联在不同调查时期是否稳定，我估计了各调查波次的模型（图 2）。在所有七个调查波次中，“有宗教信仰”的系数均为负值，其中四个波次具有统计显著性：2012 年（ b=−0.134b = -0.134b=−0.134 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）、2013 年（ b=−0.068b = -0.068b=−0.068 ， p=.028p = .028p=.028 ）、2015 年（ b=−0.065b = -0.065b=−0.065 ， p=.036p = .036p=.036 ）和 2017 年（ b=−0.093b = -0.093b=−0.093 ， p=.003p = .003p=.003 ）。2017 年后的三个调查波次（2018 年、2021 年和 2023 年）的系数均为负值，但未达到传统的显著性水平。这种时间模式，即 2012-2017 年期间的影响显著，之后影响减弱，可能反映了 2018 年修订《宗教事务条例》后中国宗教监管环境的变化。该条例明确了已获认可的宗教组织的法律地位，可能降低了宗教信徒的制度边缘化感。或者，这可能反映了 CGSS 抽样框架的构成变化或宗教认同的长期趋势。使用波次固定效应来消除不同调查时期水平差异的合并估计值仍然具有高度显著性（ b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）。完整的各波次系数见补充材料表 S6。

Trust Heterogeneity: Interaction Models
信任异质性：交互模型

Before turning to subgroup analyses, I estimate formal interaction models to test whether the religion–trust association is moderated by sociodemographic characteristics (Table [tab:interactions]). None of the six interaction terms reaches conventional significance at the 5% level. The religion×\times×CCP interaction is negligible (binteraction=−0.005b_{interaction} = -0.005binteraction​=−0.005, SESESE = 0.045, p=.91p = .91p=.91), indicating that formal CCP membership does not moderate the religion–trust association: the trust penalty is similar for religious CCP members and religious non-members. The religion×\times×college interaction is suggestive (b=−0.052b = -0.052b=−0.052, p=.21p = .21p=.21), hinting that the trust penalty may be larger among college-educated religious individuals, and the religion×\times×high income interaction shows a positive but non-significant buffering tendency (b=0.038b = 0.038b=0.038, p=.11p = .11p=.11). The absence of significant interactions across gender, ethnicity, and urbanicity suggests that the religion–trust relationship is structurally similar across these social cleavages.
在进行亚组分析之前，我首先估计了正式的交互模型，以检验宗教与信任之间的关联是否受到社会人口学特征的调节（表[tab:interactions]）。六个交互项均未达到 5%的显著性水平。宗教 ×\times× 与中共的交互作用可以忽略不计（ binteraction=−0.005b_{interaction} = -0.005binteraction​=−0.005 ， SESESE = 0.045， p=.91p = .91p=.91 ），表明正式的中共党员身份并不调节宗教与信任之间的关联：信教的中共党员和非党员的信任惩罚相似。宗教 ×\times× 与大学学历的交互作用具有一定的提示意义（ b=−0.052b = -0.052b=−0.052 ， p=.21p = .21p=.21 ），暗示受过大学教育的信教者可能面临更大的信任惩罚。宗教 ×\times× 与高收入的交互作用则显示出正向但不显著的缓冲趋势（ b=0.038b = 0.038b=0.038 ， p=.11p = .11p=.11 ）。性别、种族和城市化程度的交互作用均不显著，表明宗教与信任之间的关系在这些社会群体中结构相似。

Subgroup Analyses  亚组分析

Table [tab:heterogeneity] presents subgroup analyses testing H6. The religion–trust penalty is remarkably consistent across urban (b=−0.045b = -0.045b=−0.045, p<.01p < .01p<.01) and rural (b=−0.044b = -0.044b=−0.044, p<.05p < .05p<.05) hukou holders, ruling out the possibility that it reflects a purely urban or rural phenomenon.
