By ethnicity, the penalty is strong and significant among Han respondents (b=−0.053b = -0.053b=−0.053, p<.001p < .001p<.001) but non-significant among ethnic minorities (b=−0.018b = -0.018b=−0.018), consistent with the idea that the trust deficit reflects the position of religion within the dominant Han-majority social order rather than a feature of ethnic minority religious traditions.
表[tab:heterogeneity]呈现了检验假设 H6 的亚组分析结果。宗教信任惩罚在城市（ b=−0.045b = -0.045b=−0.045 ， p<.01p < .01p<.01 ）和农村（ b=−0.044b = -0.044b=−0.044 ， p<.05p < .05p<.05 ）户口持有者中表现出显著的一致性，排除了其反映纯粹城市或农村现象的可能性。按民族划分，汉族受访者中宗教信任惩罚显著且强烈（ b=−0.053b = -0.053b=−0.053 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），而少数民族受访者中则不显著（ b=−0.018b = -0.018b=−0.018 ），这与信任赤字反映宗教在汉族占主导地位的社会秩序中的地位，而非少数民族宗教传统的特征这一观点相符。

By CCP membership, the religion coefficient is negative in both subgroups: b=−0.064b = -0.064b=−0.064 (p=.16p = .16p=.16) among CCP members and b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 (p<.001p < .001p<.001) among non-members. The non-significance for CCP members reflects limited statistical power (only 545 religious CCP members out of 9,496 total) rather than a genuine buffering effect; the point estimate for CCP members is actually numerically larger than for non-members. This null moderation result, combined with the non-significant CCP interaction in Table [tab:interactions], indicates that CCP membership, despite its strong positive main effect on trust (b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179), does not shield religious individuals from the trust deficit.
按是否为中共党员划分，宗教系数在两个子群体中均为负值：中共党员为 b=−0.064b = -0.064b=−0.064 （ p=.16p = .16p=.16 ），非党员为 b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 （ p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）。中共党员群体的宗教系数不显著，反映的是统计效力有限（9496 名中共党员中仅有 545 名信教者），而非真正的缓冲效应；实际上，中共党员的点估计值在数值上大于非党员。这一零调节效应结果，结合表[tab:interactions]中中共党员与信任度交互作用不显著的结果，表明尽管中共党员身份对信任度有显著的正向主效应（ b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179 ），但它并不能保护信教者免受信任缺失的影响。

Age-based heterogeneity reveals that the trust penalty is concentrated among younger adults aged 18–35 (b=−0.108b = -0.108b=−0.108, p<.001p < .001p<.001) and dissipates in middle age (b=−0.033b = -0.033b=−0.033, p>.05p > .05p>.05) and older adulthood (b=−0.026b = -0.026b=−0.026, p>.10p > .10p>.10). This generational pattern suggests that religion’s trust-undermining association is not a cohort-invariant structural feature but may be intensifying among younger Chinese, perhaps reflecting the growing cultural distinctiveness of religious identity in an increasingly secular youth population.
基于年龄的异质性分析表明，信任惩罚主要集中在 18-35 岁的年轻人群（ b=−0.108b = -0.108b=−0.108 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）中，并在中年（ b=−0.033b = -0.033b=−0.033 ， p>.05p > .05p>.05 ）和老年（ b=−0.026b = -0.026b=−0.026 ， p>.10p > .10p>.10 ）中逐渐减弱。这种代际模式表明，宗教与信任削弱之间的关联并非一个群体不变的结构性特征，而是可能在中国年轻人中日益加剧，这或许反映了在日益世俗化的青年群体中，宗教身份的文化独特性日益增强。

Finally, excluding Muslim respondents, whose religious identity is tightly bound to Hui and Uyghur ethnic identity and thus potentially confounded with ethnicity, barely changes the main result (b=−0.049b = -0.049b=−0.049, p<.001p < .001p<.001 vs. b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 in the full sample), confirming that the trust penalty is not an artifact of the religion–ethnicity conflation specific to Islam in China.
最后，排除穆斯林受访者（他们的宗教身份与回族和维吾尔族身份紧密相关，因此可能与种族混淆）后，主要结果几乎没有改变（完整样本中的 b=−0.049b = -0.049b=−0.049 、 p<.001p < .001p<.001 与 b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 相比），这证实了信任惩罚并非中国伊斯兰教特有的宗教-种族混淆的产物。

Instrumental Variable Estimates
工具变量估计

The 2SLS results suggest that the OLS estimate substantially understates the causal effect of religion on generalized trust (Table 1). Using province-level leave-one-out religiosity as the sole instrument, the 2SLS coefficient is b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203 (SEclustered=0.084SE_{clustered} = 0.084SEclustered​=0.084, p=.015p = .015p=.015), approximately four times larger than OLS. The Wu-Hausman test rejects exogeneity (p=.002p = .002p=.002), confirming that the IV approach is warranted, and the reduced-form regression yields a significant negative coefficient (b=−0.183b = -0.183b=−0.183, p=.015p = .015p=.015), providing model-free evidence that provincial religious environment predicts lower individual trust. When the province LOO instrument is combined with the OSAC religious sites per capita in an overidentified model, the Sargan test fails to reject instrument validity (J=1.50J = 1.50J=1.50, p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221), providing indirect empirical support for the exclusion restriction.
两阶段最小二乘法（2SLS）结果表明，普通最小二乘法（OLS）估计显著低估了宗教对普遍信任的因果效应（表 1）。以省级留一法宗教信仰程度作为唯一工具变量，2SLS 系数为 b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203 （ SEclustered=0.084SE_{clustered} = 0.084SEclustered​=0.084 ， p=.015p = .015p=.015 ），约为 OLS 系数的四倍。Wu-Hausman 检验拒绝了外生性假设（ p=.002p = .002p=.002 ），证实了工具变量法的合理性，且简化式回归得出显著的负系数（ b=−0.183b = -0.183b=−0.183 ， p=.015p = .015p=.015 ），提供了不依赖模型的证据表明，省级宗教环境能够预测较低的个人信任度。当将省级留一法工具变量与 OSAC 人均宗教场所数量相结合，构建过度识别模型时，Sargan 检验未能拒绝工具变量有效性假设（ J=1.50J = 1.50J=1.50 ， p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221 ），为排除法约束提供了间接的经验支持。

Of the approximately four-fold amplification relative to OLS, classical attenuation bias from the binary religion variable (realistic reliability ≈\approx≈ 0.85–0.95) accounts for only 1.1–1.2×\times×; the remaining amplification likely reflects reverse causality and LATE heterogeneity among compliers, that is marginal believers whose affiliation is responsive to their provincial religious environment. Because the 2SLS estimate identifies a Local Average Treatment Effect (LATE) rather than an Average Treatment Effect (ATE), the four-fold amplification should not be interpreted as evidence that the true causal effect is four times larger than OLS for the average individual. Rather, it reflects the effect among compliers, who may differ from the general religious population in ways that amplify the trust penalty, for example by being more socially marginal or more influenced by their local religious environment. The OLS estimate (b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047) likely provides a lower bound on the ATE, while the 2SLS estimate (b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203) is best interpreted as a local effect among environmentally-induced religious adherents. Full technical details, including exclusion restriction arguments, monotonicity assumptions, and alternative clustering specifications, are reported in Supplementary Materials, Section S10.
与 OLS 相比，约四倍的放大倍数中，二元宗教变量的经典衰减偏差（实际信度 ≈\approx≈ 0.85–0.95）仅占 1.1–1.2 倍 ×\times× ；剩余的放大倍数可能反映了反向因果关系以及顺从者（即那些信仰会受到所在省份宗教环境影响的边缘信徒）的局部平均处理效应（LATE）异质性。由于 2SLS 估计识别的是局部平均处理效应（LATE）而非平均处理效应（ATE），因此不应将四倍的放大倍数解释为真实因果效应是普通个体 OLS 估计值的四倍。相反，它反映的是顺从者群体中的效应，这些群体可能与一般宗教人群存在一些差异，从而放大了信任惩罚，例如，他们可能在社会上更边缘化，或更容易受到当地宗教环境的影响。 OLS 估计（ b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 ）可能提供了 ATE 的下限，而 2SLS 估计（ b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203 ）则最好解释为环境诱发宗教信徒中的局部效应。完整的技术细节，包括排除性约束论证、单调性假设和替代聚类模型，均在补充材料 S10 节中报告。

Sensitivity Analyses  敏感性分析

The main finding is robust across a comprehensive battery of alternative specifications (full details in the Supplementary Materials). Adding province fixed effects to absorb geographic confounding attenuates the religion coefficient by approximately 23% (b=−0.036b = -0.036b=−0.036, p=.003p = .003p=.003), but it remains statistically significant, indicating that the association operates within provinces rather than merely reflecting cross-province variation in religiosity and trust. Propensity score matching (1:1 nearest-neighbor, caliper = 0.1) yields a significant estimate of similar magnitude (b=−0.054b = -0.054b=−0.054, p<.001p < .001p<.001, NmatchedN_{matched}Nmatched​ = 17,108), while inverse probability weighting produces a comparable estimate (b=−0.052b = -0.052b=−0.052, p<.001p < .001p<.001), together suggesting that selection on observables does not account for the association. The ordered logistic regression confirms the OLS result (b=−0.075b = -0.075b=−0.075, p<.001p < .001p<.001), and the E-value for unmeasured confounding is 1.25, meaning that an unmeasured confounder would need to be associated with both religion and trust by a risk ratio of at least 1.25, above and beyond measured covariates, to reduce the association to zero (VanderWeele 2017). This E-value is modest, and values below 1.5 indicate that even a weak unmeasured confounder could substantially attenuate the association, but the IV analysis provides much stronger causal evidence than the E-value alone, and the convergence of multiple identification strategies provides more robust evidence for the causal interpretation than any single sensitivity measure. All sensitivity analyses are reported in the Supplementary Materials, Tables S1–S10.
主要发现经一系列全面的替代模型设定后依然稳健（详见补充材料）。加入省份固定效应以消除地理混杂因素后，宗教系数减弱了约 23%（ b=−0.036b = -0.036b=−0.036 ， p=.003p = .003p=.003 ），但仍具有统计学意义，表明这种关联存在于省份内部，而不仅仅是反映了宗教信仰和信任度的跨省差异。倾向得分匹配（1:1 最近邻匹配，卡尺=0.1）得出了大小相近的显著估计值（ b=−0.054b = -0.054b=−0.054 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ， NmatchedN_{matched}Nmatched​ =17,108），而逆概率加权法也得出了类似的估计值（ b=−0.052b = -0.052b=−0.052 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），这些结果共同表明，基于可观测变量的选择并不能解释这种关联。有序逻辑回归证实了 OLS 的结果（ b=−0.075b = -0.075b=−0.075 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），未测量混杂因素的 E 值为 1.25，这意味着，一个未测量的混杂因素需要与宗教和信任都存在关联，且风险比至少为 1.25（在已测量的协变量之外），才能将关联性降低至零（VanderWeele 2017）。该 E 值并不高，低于 1.5 的值表明，即使是较弱的未测量混杂因素也可能显著减弱关联性。然而，工具变量（IV）分析提供的因果证据比单独使用 E 值要强得多，多种识别策略的融合也比任何单一的敏感性分析方法都能为因果解释提供更稳健的证据。所有敏感性分析均在补充材料表 S1-S10 中报告。

Discussion  讨论

The Religion–Trust Paradox in the Chinese Context
中国语境下的宗教与信任悖论

The central finding of this study, that religious affiliation is negatively associated with generalized trust in contemporary China, does not merely fail to confirm Putnam (2000)’s ((2000)) social capital framework; it actively reverses it. Where Western scholarship has documented a positive religion–trust nexus rooted in congregational participation and civic norm formation (Lim and Putnam 2010; Welch et al. 2004; Smidt 1999), the Chinese case demonstrates that the same theoretical relationship can run in the opposite direction when institutional conditions differ. The IV analysis elevates this from a correlational observation to quasi-experimental evidence: the convergence of two conceptually independent instruments (Sargan p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221) provides the strongest causal evidence to date that religion causally reduces generalized trust in a non-Western context. This represents a fundamental challenge to the universality of the Putnamesque thesis and supports a growing body of comparative evidence that religion’s civic consequences are contingent on the political, institutional, and cultural environment in which religious life is embedded (Traunmüller 2011; Berggren and Bjornskov 2011; Sarkissian 2015).
本研究的核心发现是，在当代中国，宗教信仰与普遍信任呈负相关。这一发现不仅未能证实普特南（Putnam，2000）的社会资本框架，而且恰恰相反。西方学术界已证实，宗教与信任之间存在积极的关联，这种关联根植于信众参与和公民规范的形成（Lim and Putnam，2010；Welch et al.，2004；Smidt，1999）。然而，中国案例表明，当制度条件不同时，同样的理论关系可能会朝着相反的方向发展。工具变量分析将这一发现从相关性观察提升到准实验证据：两个概念上独立的工具变量（Sargan p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221 ）的收敛性提供了迄今为止最强有力的因果证据，表明在非西方背景下，宗教会因果地降低普遍信任。这代表着对普特纳姆式论题的普遍性的根本挑战，并支持越来越多的比较证据，即宗教的公民后果取决于宗教生活所嵌入的政治、制度和文化环境（Traunmüller 2011；Berggren 和 Bjornskov 2011；Sarkissian 2015）。

The IV estimate of b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203 suggests that the true causal effect may be substantially larger than the OLS estimate, though the four-fold amplification partly reflects LATE heterogeneity among compliers rather than simple underestimation (see Results). To put this finding in comparative context, existing single-wave CGSS studies have reported null or weakly negative associations between religion and trust (Zhang and Li 2020; Niu and Zhao 2018), which may be attributable to insufficient statistical power in individual survey waves. Hu (2013), using propensity score matching in urban China, found that Protestants exhibited lower generalized trust but higher trust in religious adherents and organizations—a pattern consistent with the particularistic trust dynamic documented in this study and reinforcing the conclusion that religion in China strengthens in-group bonds at the expense of generalized trust. My pooled seven-wave design (N=78,993N = 78{,}993N=78,993) provides the statistical power to detect effects that individual waves cannot. Several features of this result merit theoretical attention.
工具变量估计值 b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203 表明，真实的因果效应可能远大于普通最小二乘法估计值，尽管四倍的放大效应部分反映了参与者之间的后期异质性，而非简单的低估（见结果）。为了将这一发现置于比较背景下，现有的单波次 CGSS 研究报告称，宗教与信任之间存在零相关或弱负相关（Zhang 和 Li 2020；Niu 和 Zhao 2018），这可能是由于单次调查的统计效力不足所致。Hu（2013）在中国城市地区使用倾向得分匹配法发现，基督教新教徒表现出较低的普遍信任，但对宗教信徒和组织的信任较高——这一模式与本研究中记录的特殊主义信任动态一致，并强化了以下结论：在中国，宗教以牺牲普遍信任为代价来加强群体内部联系。我的七波次汇总设计（ N=78,993N = 78{,}993N=78,993 ）提供了足够的统计效力来检测单波次调查无法检测到的效应。这一结果的几个特征值得理论关注。

First, the association is not driven by a single religious tradition. Buddhism, Taoism/folk religion, and Christianity all carry statistically significant negative coefficients, while Islam’s coefficient is non-significant. This breadth suggests that the trust deficit is not a function of specific theological content (e.g., exclusivist doctrine) but of the structural position of religious identity in Chinese society more broadly. Second, the trust penalty intensifies with practice frequency: respondents who practice weekly or more exhibit the largest deficit (b=−0.111b = -0.111b=−0.111), suggesting that deeper religious engagement amplifies whatever mechanism is at work. Third, the simultaneous positive association with happiness rules out the possibility that religious identity simply reflects a general orientation toward pessimism or social dissatisfaction; religious Chinese are not globally less trusting because they are unhappier, but rather because trust and happiness respond to different dimensions of religious experience.
首先，这种关联并非由单一宗教传统驱动。佛教、道教/民间宗教和基督教的系数均为显著的负值，而伊斯兰教的系数则不显著。这种广泛性表明，信任缺失并非源于特定的神学内容（例如，排他性教义），而是源于宗教身份在中国社会更广泛的结构性地位。其次，信任惩罚随着宗教活动频率的增加而加剧：每周或更频繁进行宗教活动的受访者表现出最大的信任缺失（ b=−0.111b = -0.111b=−0.111 ），这表明更深入的宗教参与会放大任何正在发挥作用的机制。第三，与幸福感同时存在的正相关排除了宗教身份仅仅反映一种普遍的悲观倾向或社会不满的可能性；信教的中国人并非因为不快乐而普遍缺乏信任，而是因为信任和幸福感反映的是宗教体验的不同维度。

Mechanisms: Fairness, Health, and Institutional Alienation
机制：公平、健康和制度疏离

The causal mediation analysis identifies perceived social fairness as the primary pathway linking religion to lower trust: the ACME through fairness is −0.019-0.019−0.019 (p<.001p < .001p<.001), accounting for 40% of the total statistical association, while the ACME through health is a modest −0.003-0.003−0.003 (6% of the association). This asymmetry between the two mediators is theoretically revealing. It suggests that the religion–trust deficit in China is primarily a story about institutional perceptions rather than compositional health disadvantage.
因果中介分析表明，感知到的社会公平是宗教与较低信任度之间的主要联系途径：通过公平的因果中介效应为 −0.019-0.019−0.019 （ p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），占总统计关联的 40%；而通过健康的因果中介效应则较低，为 −0.003-0.003−0.003 （占关联的 6%）。这两个中介变量之间的这种不对称性具有理论意义。它表明，中国宗教与信任度之间的差异主要源于对制度的认知，而非构成性的健康劣势。

This finding aligns with Rothstein and Stolle (2005)’s ((2005)) institutional theory of trust. Rothstein and Stolle argued that generalized trust is fundamentally shaped by the perceived fairness and impartiality of political institutions, rather than by civic participation or associational density, the very mechanisms emphasized by Putnam (2000). My results extend their logic to an authoritarian context with a regulated religious market. The collectivist dimension of Chinese social structure may further compound this dynamic: Glanville and Shi (2020) have shown that collectivist orientations constrain the extension of trust beyond one’s immediate social circle, suggesting that religious in-group solidarity in a collectivist society is particularly likely to come at the expense of generalized trust. In China, where the state restricts religious freedom, where religious organizations face bureaucratic oversight, and where religious identity sits uneasily alongside the party-state’s atheist ideology, religious individuals may perceive the social order as systematically less fair (Yang 2006; Sarkissian 2015). This experience of institutional unfairness then spills over into a broader skepticism about whether “most people in this society can be trusted.”
这一发现与 Rothstein 和 Stolle（2005）的信任制度理论相符。Rothstein 和 Stolle 认为，普遍信任的根本在于人们对政治制度公平性和公正性的感知，而非公民参与或社群密度——而后者恰恰是 Putnam（2000）所强调的机制。我的研究结果将他们的逻辑扩展到了宗教市场受到管制的威权主义背景下。中国社会结构的集体主义维度可能会进一步加剧这种动态：Glanville 和 Shi（2020）的研究表明，集体主义倾向会限制信任向个人直接社交圈之外的延伸，这意味着在集体主义社会中，宗教群体内部的团结尤其可能以牺牲普遍信任为代价。在中国，国家限制宗教自由，宗教组织面临官僚机构的监管，宗教身份与党国无神论意识形态格格不入，宗教人士可能会认为社会秩序系统性地不够公平（Yang 2006; Sarkissian 2015）。这种制度性不公的体验会进一步引发人们对“这个社会中的大多数人是否值得信任”的普遍怀疑。

Self-rated health also partially mediates the association, though its contribution is smaller than that of fairness. Religious respondents report poorer health (b=−0.046b = -0.046b=−0.046), consistent with the demographic profile of Chinese religious adherents (older, less educated, more rural) and with the possibility that health-related vulnerability is one pathway through which structural disadvantage translates into lower trust. This finding differs from the positive religion–health association documented in Western populations by Koenig (2012) and VanderWeele (2017), and may reflect the fact that in China, poorer health can motivate religious adoption (individuals turning to religion for healing or comfort) rather than religion undermining health. The cross-sectional design cannot distinguish these directions, but either way, the health pathway contributes to explaining the trust deficit.
自评健康状况也部分地调节了这种关联，尽管其贡献小于公平感。有宗教信仰的受访者报告健康状况较差（ b=−0.046b = -0.046b=−0.046 ），这与中国宗教信徒的人口特征（年龄较大、受教育程度较低、居住在农村地区较多）相符，也与健康相关的脆弱性可能是结构性劣势转化为较低信任度的途径之一这一可能性相吻合。这一发现与 Koenig（2012）和 VanderWeele（2017）在西方人群中记录的宗教与健康之间的正相关关系不同，可能反映了这样一个事实：在中国，较差的健康状况会促使人们接受宗教信仰（个人寻求宗教的治愈或慰藉），而不是宗教损害健康。横断面研究设计无法区分这两种方向，但无论如何，健康途径都有助于解释信任度的不足。

The convergence of evidence across identification strategies strengthens the causal interpretation. The Wu-Hausman test rejects exogeneity (p=.002p = .002p=.002), and the Sargan overidentification test confirms that two conceptually distinct instruments, province-level social environment and historical religious infrastructure, produce convergent estimates (p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221). The Anderson-Rubin 95% confidence interval with province-clustered SEs is [−0.367-0.367−0.367, −0.039-0.039−0.039], excluding zero.
不同识别策略下证据的趋同性增强了因果解释的可靠性。Wu-Hausman 检验拒绝了外生性假设（ p=.002p = .002p=.002 ），Sargan 过度识别检验证实，两个概念上不同的工具变量——省级社会环境和历史宗教基础设施——产生了趋同的估计值（ p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221 ）。采用省级聚类标准误的 Anderson-Rubin 95%置信区间为[ −0.367-0.367−0.367 , −0.039-0.039−0.039 ]，不包含零。

A noteworthy pattern emerges from comparing across identification strategies. The province FE estimate (b=−0.036b = -0.036b=−0.036) is smaller than the baseline OLS without province FE (b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047), and both are substantially smaller than the IV estimate (b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203). This 5.6×\times× discrepancy between IV and province FE warrants interpretation. The province FE specification identifies the religion–trust association using only within-province variation, absorbing all time-invariant province-level confounders but also removing the cross-province variation that the IV exploits. The IV specification, by contrast, identifies the causal effect through cross-province variation in religious environment. These target different causal parameters, and the discrepancy likely reflects a combination of: (1) attenuation bias from binary measurement error (affecting both OLS and FE but corrected by IV); (2) province FE absorbing real cross-province causal variation alongside confounders; and (3) LATE heterogeneity, with compliers, marginal believers responsive to provincial environment, potentially experiencing larger trust penalties than the average individual.
通过比较不同的识别策略，可以发现一个值得注意的模式。省级固定效应估计值（ b=−0.036b = -0.036b=−0.036 ）小于不包含省级固定效应的基准 OLS 估计值（ b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 ），而两者都显著小于工具变量估计值（ b=−0.203b = -0.203b=−0.203 ）。工具变量和省级固定效应之间 5.6 倍的差异 ×\times× 值得解释。省级固定效应模型仅使用省内变异来识别宗教与信任之间的关联，吸收了所有不随时间变化的省级混杂因素，但也消除了工具变量所利用的跨省变异。相比之下，工具变量模型通过跨省的宗教环境变异来识别因果效应。这两种模型针对不同的因果参数，这种差异可能反映了以下因素的组合：（1）二元测量误差造成的衰减偏差（影响 OLS 和固定效应，但工具变量可以校正）；（2）省级固定效应模型吸收了真实的跨省因果变异以及混杂因素。 （3）后期异质性，顺从者、边缘信徒对省级环境的反应可能比普通人遭受更大的信任惩罚。

Propensity score matching yields a significant estimate (b=−0.054b = -0.054b=−0.054, p<.001p < .001p<.001), while inverse probability weighting produces a similar estimate (b=−0.052b = -0.052b=−0.052, p<.001p < .001p<.001). Together, these results suggest that while some observable selection is present, it accounts for only a fraction of the association, and the IV analysis indicates that the remaining bias runs toward zero (underestimation) rather than away from it.
倾向得分匹配法得出显著的估计值（ b=−0.054b = -0.054b=−0.054 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），而逆概率加权法得出类似的估计值（ b=−0.052b = -0.052b=−0.052 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）。这些结果共同表明，虽然存在一些可观察到的选择偏差，但它仅能解释关联的一小部分，并且工具变量分析表明，剩余的偏差趋向于零（低估），而不是远离零。

Taken together, the causal mediation estimates indicate that approximately 40% of the religion–trust statistical association is accounted for by fairness perceptions, with a much smaller share (∼\sim∼6%) through subjective health. The remaining ∼\sim∼54% operates through pathways not captured by the available mediators, likely including the in-group solidarity mechanism (religion narrowing the radius of trust), direct effects of religious worldviews on social orientation, and social network effects that the CGSS does not measure. Moreover, if the IV estimate of b≈−0.20b \approx -0.20b≈−0.20 better approximates the true causal effect, then the ACME through fairness is proportionally larger: approximately −0.076-0.076−0.076 rather than −0.019-0.019−0.019, suggesting that the institutional alienation mechanism accounts for a substantial share of the true causal effect. Future work with richer network data could disaggregate these remaining pathways.
综合来看，因果中介效应估计表明，宗教与信任之间的统计关联中约 40%是由公平感知造成的，而主观健康所占比例则小得多（ ∼\sim∼ 6%）。剩余的 ∼\sim∼ 54%是通过现有中介变量无法捕捉到的路径发挥作用的，可能包括群体内部团结机制（宗教缩小信任半径）、宗教世界观对社会取向的直接影响，以及 CGSS 未测量的社会网络效应。此外，如果工具变量估计值 b≈−0.20b \approx -0.20b≈−0.20 能更好地近似真实的因果效应，那么通过公平感知的 ACME 效应比例会更大：约为 −0.076-0.076−0.076 而非 −0.019-0.019−0.019 ，这表明制度疏离机制在真实的因果效应中占有相当大的比例。未来利用更丰富的网络数据可以进一步分解这些剩余路径。

The CCP membership finding merits further discussion. CCP membership is the strongest predictor of generalized trust among all covariates (b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179, p<.001p < .001p<.001), consistent with the institutional integration thesis: party members are socialized into norms of social solidarity and enjoy institutional benefits that foster confidence in the broader social order (Chen and Lu 2007). However, this institutional integration does not extend to buffering the religion–trust penalty. The religion×\times×CCP interaction is negligible (b=−0.005b = -0.005b=−0.005, p=.91p = .91p=.91; Table [tab:interactions]), and subgroup analysis shows that religious CCP members experience a trust deficit (b=−0.064b = -0.064b=−0.064) that is, if anything, numerically larger than that of religious non-members (b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047), though the CCP subgroup estimate does not reach significance due to limited power (only 545 religious CCP members). This null moderation result is itself theoretically informative: it suggests that the religion–trust penalty operates through mechanisms (perceived social unfairness, in-group solidarity, marginalized identity) that are not offset by the institutional integration CCP membership provides. CCP members who also hold religious beliefs may face a distinctive form of cognitive tension between their institutional position and their spiritual identity, preventing party membership from serving as a buffer against religion’s trust-eroding effects. This finding diverges from the expectation that political integration moderates religion’s civic consequences and points instead to the independent and additive nature of religious and political identity effects on generalized trust.
关于中共党员身份的研究结果值得进一步探讨。在所有协变量中，中共党员身份是普遍信任的最强预测因子（ b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ），这与制度整合理论相符：党员被社会化为社会团结的规范，并享受制度性利益，从而增强对更广泛社会秩序的信心（Chen and Lu 2007）。然而，这种制度整合并不能缓解宗教信仰与信任之间的负面影响。宗教信仰与中共党员身份的交互作用可以忽略不计（ b=−0.005b = -0.005b=−0.005 ， p=.91p = .91p=.91 ；表[tab:interactions]），亚组分析表明，信奉宗教的中共党员存在信任赤字（ b=−0.064b = -0.064b=−0.064 ），其数值甚至高于非信奉宗教的党员（ b=−0.047b = -0.047b=−0.047 ），尽管由于样本量有限（仅有 545 名信奉宗教的中共党员），中共党员亚组的估计值未达到显著性水平。这一零调节效应本身就具有理论意义：它表明，宗教信仰对信任的惩罚作用是通过一些机制（例如感知到的社会不公、群体内部的团结、边缘化身份）实现的，而这些机制并不能被中共党员身份所带来的制度性融入所抵消。同时持有宗教信仰的中共党员可能面临着一种独特的认知张力，即他们的制度地位与精神身份之间的矛盾，这使得党员身份无法起到缓冲宗教信仰对信任侵蚀作用的作用。这一发现与政治融入能够调节宗教信仰对公民生活的影响的预期相悖，反而表明宗教身份和政治身份对普遍信任的影响是独立且叠加的。

Bonding Without Bridging? The Domain-Specificity of Religion’s Effects
无需桥梁即可建立联系？宗教影响的领域特异性

The dual finding, that religion undermines trust while modestly enhancing happiness, invites interpretation through the bonding/bridging distinction originally proposed by Putnam (2000) and elaborated in the religion context by Wuthnow (1999) and Lim and Putnam (2010). Bonding social capital refers to the solidarity, mutual support, and meaning-making resources that circulate within tight-knit communities; bridging social capital refers to the generalized norms and cross-cutting ties that connect diverse groups. The pattern in my data is consistent with the hypothesis that religion in China generates bonding capital (hence the happiness premium) without producing bridging capital (hence the trust deficit). I emphasize that this interpretation remains a hypothesis rather than a demonstrated mechanism, as the CGSS does not directly measure within-group social support, frequency of contact with co-religionists, or cross-group social ties. This interpretation is reinforced by Chen and Williams (2016), who found that religion’s wellbeing benefits in China operate not through social capital but through the private and subjective dimensions of religious life, and by Luo and Chen (2021), who showed that religious adherents with more salient religious identities reported higher life satisfaction—suggesting that the personal meaning religion provides may coexist with, rather than counteract, its trust-eroding effects. Future research with richer network data could directly test whether religious involvement in China builds within-group solidarity at the expense of between-group trust.
宗教在适度提升幸福感的同时削弱信任感，这一双重发现引人深思。我们可以运用普特南（Putnam，2000）最初提出的“联结型/桥梁型”区分理论来解读这一现象，该理论后经伍斯诺（Wuthnow，1999）以及林和普特南（Lim & Putnam，2010）在宗教语境下进一步阐述。联结型社会资本指的是紧密社群内部流通的团结、互助和意义建构资源；桥梁型社会资本指的是连接不同群体的普遍规范和跨领域联系。我的数据模式与以下假设相符：在中国，宗教能够产生联结型资本（因此带来幸福感溢价），但不会产生桥梁型资本（因此造成信任赤字）。我强调，这一解释目前仍是一种假设，而非已证实的机制，因为中国社会调查（CGSS）并未直接测量群体内部的社会支持、与同教信徒的接触频率或跨群体的社会联系。 Chen 和 Williams (2016) 的研究也强化了这一解释。他们发现，宗教在中国带来的福祉益处并非通过社会资本实现，而是通过宗教生活的私人和主观维度发挥作用。Luo 和 Chen (2021) 的研究也表明，宗教身份认同更为鲜明的信徒拥有更高的生活满意度——这暗示宗教所提供的个人意义可能与其削弱信任的作用并存，而非相互抵消。未来利用更丰富的网络数据开展的研究可以直接检验，在中国，宗教参与是否会以牺牲群体间信任为代价来增强群体内部的团结。

Figure 3 illustrates the descriptive patterns, showing mean generalized trust across religious traditions stratified by practice status. This pattern is particularly stark for Islam, which shows the strongest positive happiness effect (b=0.168b = 0.168b=0.168) and no significant trust deficit. Muslim communities in China, primarily Hui and Uyghur, are characterized by dense communal networks, strong in-group solidarity, and relatively clear boundaries with the Han majority (Yang 2011). These features may enhance personal wellbeing through social support and cultural identity while having no effect, or even a mildly insulating effect, on generalized trust. The Islam exception likely reflects the unique institutional position of Chinese Muslims: Hui Muslims, who constitute the vast majority of Muslim CGSS respondents (97.6% are ethnic minorities, predominantly Hui), are among the most institutionally integrated ethnic-religious groups in China: many are CCP members, speak Mandarin, and participate fully in mainstream economic life. Their recognized ethnic minority status partially satisfies the institutional integration condition that buffers against trust erosion. An important caveat, however, is that the Islam variable is substantially confounded with Hui ethnicity: 97.6% of Muslim respondents are ethnic minorities, and the Hui are an ethnic group whose identity is inseparable from Islamic heritage. The model controls for Han ethnicity, but this binary measure cannot fully disentangle religion from ethnicity for Muslim respondents. The null trust coefficient for Islam may therefore reflect the distinctive social position of the Hui as an institutionally integrated ethnic-religious minority rather than a property of Islamic belief or practice per se. Ideally, one would disaggregate the Islam effect by ethnicity (Hui vs. Uyghur), but the CGSS contains only 35 Han Muslims and does not directly identify Hui versus Uyghur ethnicity, precluding this analysis. The supplementary analysis excluding all Muslim respondents (b=−0.049b = -0.049b=−0.049, p<.001p < .001p<.001) confirms that the main finding is not driven by the Islam subgroup.
图 3 展示了描述性模式，显示了按宗教实践状况分层的各宗教传统的平均普遍信任度。伊斯兰教的模式尤为显著，其幸福感效应最为显著（ b=0.168b = 0.168b=0.168 ），且不存在明显的信任赤字。中国的穆斯林社群，主要由回族和维吾尔族组成，其特点是社群网络紧密、群体内部团结度高，且与汉族主体之间的界限相对清晰（Yang 2011）。这些特征可能通过社会支持和文化认同提升个人幸福感，同时对普遍信任度没有影响，甚至可能起到轻微的缓冲作用。伊斯兰教的例外情况可能反映了中国穆斯林独特的制度地位：回族穆斯林占中国社会调查（CGSS）穆斯林受访者的绝大多数（97.6%为少数民族，其中以回族为主），他们是中国制度融合度最高的民族宗教群体之一：许多回族穆斯林是中共党员，讲普通话，并充分参与主流经济生活。他们被认可的少数民族身份在一定程度上满足了制度融合的条件，从而缓冲了信任度的下降。然而，需要特别注意的是，伊斯兰教变量与回族身份存在显著混淆：97.6%的穆斯林受访者属于少数民族，而回族是一个其身份认同与伊斯兰传统密不可分的民族。虽然模型控制了汉族身份，但对于穆斯林受访者而言，这种二元变量无法完全区分宗教信仰和民族身份。因此，伊斯兰教的零信任系数可能反映的是回族作为制度上与宗教和民族融合的少数民族所具有的独特社会地位，而非伊斯兰信仰或实践本身的属性。 理想情况下，应该按民族（回族与维吾尔族）细分伊斯兰教的影响，但中国社会调查（CGSS）仅包含 35 名汉族穆斯林，且未直接区分回族和维吾尔族，因此无法进行此项分析。排除所有穆斯林受访者的补充分析（ b=−0.049b = -0.049b=−0.049 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）证实，主要发现并非由伊斯兰教亚群体所驱动。

Taoism/folk religion presents the opposite pattern: the largest trust deficit (b=−0.087b = -0.087b=−0.087) and a significant negative association with happiness (b=−0.078b = -0.078b=−0.078). A construct validity caveat is warranted: the CGSS folk religion category (minjian xinyang) conflates ancestor worship, local deity worship, fortune-telling, and fengshui under a single umbrella, and it is unclear whether self-identified folk religion practitioners constitute a distinctive social group or represent a residual category for non-standard religious identification. Nonetheless, the finding is substantively puzzling from the bonding-capital perspective, since folk religion in China is often characterized by diffuse, non-congregational practices (visiting temples, burning incense, consulting fortune-tellers) rather than tight-knit community structures (Fan 2011; Chau 2006). Chau (2006), in his ethnography of popular religion in rural Shaanbei, documented how folk religious practices are deeply embedded in local kinship and patronage networks but generate little of the “generalized reciprocity” that Putnam (2000) associated with civic trust. One possibility is that Taoist and folk-religious identity in contemporary China is associated with a sense of cultural marginality vis-à-vis the modernizing, marketizing mainstream, a position from which the question “Can most people in this society be trusted?” resonates quite differently than it does for secular urbanites.
道教/民间宗教呈现出相反的模式：信任度赤字最大（ b=−0.087b = -0.087b=−0.087 ），且与幸福感呈显著负相关（ b=−0.078b = -0.078b=−0.078 ）。需要注意的是，该研究存在结构效度问题：中国社会调查（CGSS）中的民间宗教类别（民间信教）将祖先崇拜、地方神灵崇拜、算命和风水等混为一谈，因此尚不清楚自认为是民间宗教信徒的人究竟构成了一个独特的社会群体，还是代表了一种非标准宗教认同的残余类别。尽管如此，从凝聚资本的角度来看，这一发现仍然令人费解，因为中国的民间宗教通常以分散的、非集会性的实践（如参拜寺庙、烧香、求助算命）为特征，而非紧密的社群结构（Fan 2011; Chau 2006）。周（2006）在其对陕北农村民间宗教的民族志研究中记录了民间宗教习俗如何深深植根于当地的亲属关系和庇护网络，但却鲜少产生普特南（2000）所认为的公民信任中普遍存在的“互惠性”。一种可能性是，当代中国的道教和民间宗教身份认同与一种相对于现代化、市场化主流的文化边缘感相关联，在这种立场下，“这个社会的大多数人值得信任吗？”这个问题所引发的思考，与世俗的城市居民截然不同。

Christianity occupies an intermediate position: a significant trust deficit (b=−0.057b = -0.057b=−0.057, p<.05p < .05p<.05) alongside a non-significant positive happiness association (b=0.028b = 0.028b=0.028). This aligns with the observation that Chinese Protestantism, while the most congregationally organized of China’s religions, operates under persistent state suspicion. Cao (2010), in his study of “boss Christians” in Wenzhou, documented how Chinese Protestant communities generate intense in-group solidarity and mutual economic support but exist in constant negotiation with state authorities, a position that may simultaneously enhance members’ personal wellbeing (through congregational support) and erode their generalized social trust (through awareness of their marginal status). The rapid growth of Protestantism documented by Sun (2017) may further intensify this dynamic, as the expanding Christian population creates larger but still bounded communities. Hu et al. (2017) found that Chinese Christians actually reported higher depression levels, a pattern they attributed to the psychological burden of holding a marginal religious identity—further evidence that religion’s social costs in China may extend beyond trust to mental health outcomes.
基督教处于一种中间位置：存在显著的信任赤字（ b=−0.057b = -0.057b=−0.057 ， p<.05p < .05p<.05 ），同时与幸福感呈不显著的正相关（ b=0.028b = 0.028b=0.028 ）。这与以下观察相符：中国基督教虽然是中国各宗教中教会组织最严密的，但却一直处于国家持续的怀疑之下。曹（2010）在其对温州“基督徒老板”的研究中记录了中国基督教社群如何产生强烈的群体内部团结和相互经济支持，但同时又与国家当局保持着持续的博弈。这种处境可能一方面提升了成员的个人福祉（通过教会的支持），另一方面又削弱了他们普遍的社会信任（通过意识到自身边缘地位）。孙（2017）记录的基督教的快速发展可能会进一步加剧这种动态，因为不断增长的基督教人口形成了规模更大但仍然相对封闭的社群。胡等人（2017） （2017 年）的研究发现，中国基督徒的抑郁程度实际上更高，他们将这种现象归因于持有边缘宗教身份所带来的心理负担——这进一步证明，宗教在中国的社会成本可能不仅限于信任，还会影响心理健康。

Generational Dynamics and Implications
代际动态及其影响

The age-based heterogeneity raises important questions about the trajectory of the religion–trust relationship. The trust penalty is concentrated among young adults (18–35) and absent among older Chinese. This could reflect a cohort effect: younger religious Chinese may experience greater social distance from their secular peers in an increasingly secularized youth culture, intensifying the marginality mechanism. This generational pattern may also reflect broader secularization dynamics: Voas and Chaves (2016) documented that even in the United States, religious decline follows a gradual cohort-replacement pattern, and Hu (2015) showed that social trust in reform-era China has followed its own distinctive trajectory shaped by institutional transformation. Alternatively, it could reflect a life-course effect, with religious identity becoming more normative and less socially consequential as individuals age. Distinguishing these interpretations requires panel data that the CGSS’s cross-sectional design cannot provide, but the pattern suggests that religion’s civic consequences in China may be intensifying rather than attenuating over time.
基于年龄的异质性引发了关于宗教与信任关系轨迹的重要问题。信任惩罚主要集中在年轻人（18-35 岁）中，而老年人则没有这种现象。这可能反映了一种世代效应：在日益世俗化的青年文化中，年轻的信教中国人可能与世俗同龄人之间存在更大的社会距离，从而加剧了边缘化机制。这种代际模式也可能反映了更广泛的世俗化动态：Voas 和 Chaves（2016）的研究表明，即使在美国，宗教衰落也遵循着渐进的世代更替模式；Hu（2015）的研究也表明，改革开放时期中国的社会信任经历了受制度转型影响的独特轨迹。此外，这种模式也可能反映了一种生命历程效应，即随着年龄的增长，宗教认同变得更加规范化，社会影响也随之减弱。区分这些解释需要面板数据，而 CGSS 的横截面设计无法提供这些数据，但这种模式表明，随着时间的推移，宗教在中国的公民影响可能正在加剧而不是减弱。

The interaction models (Table [tab:interactions]) further reveal that gender, income, education, ethnicity, and urbanicity do not significantly moderate the religion–trust association (all interaction p>.10p > .10p>.10), while no single moderator emerges as dominant. This pattern, with no significant interaction among the six tested, is itself theoretically informative: it suggests that the religion–trust relationship is not driven by compositional differences in the religious population (who tends to be female, older, less educated) but rather by political-institutional dynamics specific to the party-state context. If the trust deficit were purely compositional, we would expect to see significant gender, education, or urbanicity interactions; their absence points instead to a mechanism operating at the level of religious identity itself, independent of its intersection with other social categories.
交互模型（表[tab:interactions]）进一步揭示，性别、收入、教育程度、种族和城市化程度均未显著调节宗教信仰与信任之间的关系（所有交互作用均为 0），且没有哪个单一调节变量占据主导地位。这种模式本身就具有理论意义，即在所测试的六个变量之间均未发现显著的交互作用：它表明，宗教信仰与信任之间的关系并非由宗教人群的构成差异（往往是女性、年龄较大、教育程度较低）所驱动，而是由政党国家体制下特有的政治制度动态所驱动。如果信任缺失完全是由构成因素造成的，我们预期会看到显著的性别、教育程度或城市化程度交互作用；然而，这些交互作用的缺失表明，存在一种独立于宗教身份与其他社会类别交叉的机制在宗教身份层面发挥作用。

These findings carry implications for both sociological theory and policy. From a policy standpoint, the finding that religion erodes trust primarily through perceptions of social unfairness suggests that the trust deficit is not an inevitable consequence of religious belief but a product of the institutional environment. If the party-state’s regulatory framework were to evolve toward greater inclusion of religious organizations in civic life, as some scholars have advocated (Yang 2006), the fairness mechanism could be attenuated, potentially reducing the trust gap. Religious organizations themselves might contribute to bridging trust by expanding their engagement beyond co-religionists, though the regulatory constraints documented above limit their capacity to do so.
这些发现对社会学理论和政策都具有重要意义。从政策角度来看，宗教主要通过加剧社会不公感来削弱信任，这一发现表明，信任缺失并非宗教信仰的必然结果，而是制度环境的产物。如果党国体制的监管框架能够像一些学者所倡导的那样（Yang 2006），朝着更加包容宗教组织参与公民生活的方向发展，那么公平机制的作用可能会减弱，从而有可能缩小信任差距。宗教组织本身也可以通过扩大其参与范围，超越教友群体，来促进信任的弥合，但上述监管限制制约了它们在这方面的能力。

More broadly, these findings reinforce the call for context-sensitive approaches to religion and social capital (Smidt 1999; Traunmüller 2011) and suggest that the religion–trust relationship is contingent on at least three institutional scope conditions: (1) state regulation of religion, where the party-state’s corporatist management creates a climate of surveillance and restriction that generates perceptions of institutional unfairness among religious adherents; (2) absence of congregational infrastructure, where without the dense associational networks characteristic of Western churches, Chinese religions lack the organizational vehicle for generating bridging social capital; and (3) religious identity as social marginality, where in an officially atheist society, religious affiliation signals distance from the political mainstream. Where all three conditions are met, as in China, Vietnam, and some Central Asian states, we should expect religion to undermine rather than promote generalized trust. Where none holds, as in the American voluntary religious marketplace, the Putnamesque thesis applies. These scope conditions also explain the Islam exception: Chinese Muslims (particularly Hui) have achieved greater institutional integration through recognized ethnic minority status, partially fulfilling condition (3) and explaining why Islam does not carry a trust penalty. These findings suggest that the mechanisms linking religion to civic outcomes are shaped by state-religion relations, religious market structures, and the cultural valence of religious identity. Sarkissian (2015), using data from 166 countries, showed that government restrictions on religion were associated with lower social trust at the aggregate level, a macro-level pattern consistent with the individual-level associations I document here. The Putnamesque thesis is not wrong; it accurately describes a real phenomenon in Western democracies with established congregational traditions, but it should not be treated as a universal law of social organization. As Berggren and Bjornskov (2011) concluded from their analysis of 105 countries, “the importance of religion in daily life is negatively related to trust” at the aggregate level, a finding that my individual-level analysis from China’s specific institutional context helps to explain.
更广泛地说，这些发现强化了对宗教与社会资本采取情境敏感型研究方法的呼吁（Smidt 1999; Traunmüller 2011），并表明宗教与信任的关系至少取决于三个制度范围条件：（1）国家对宗教的管制，在这种情况下，党国主义的社团主义管理营造了一种监视和限制的氛围，导致宗教信徒对制度不公产生感知；（2）缺乏教会组织架构，由于缺乏西方教会特有的密集社团网络，中国宗教缺乏构建桥梁型社会资本的组织载体；（3）宗教身份作为社会边缘性，在官方无神论社会中，宗教信仰表明与政治主流的疏离。在所有三个条件都满足的情况下，例如在中国、越南和一些中亚国家，我们应该预期宗教会削弱而非促进普遍信任。而当这三个条件都不成立时，例如在美国自愿参与的宗教市场中，普特纳姆式的论点则适用。这些范围条件也解释了伊斯兰教的例外情况：中国穆斯林（尤其是回族）通过获得少数民族地位的认可，实现了更高程度的制度融合，部分满足了条件（3），并解释了为什么伊斯兰教不会导致信任惩罚。这些发现表明，宗教与公民社会结果之间的联系机制受到政教关系、宗教市场结构以及宗教身份的文化价值的影响。 萨基西安（2015）利用来自 166 个国家的数据表明，政府对宗教的限制与总体层面的社会信任度降低相关，这一宏观层面的模式与我在此记录的个体层面的关联相一致。普特纳姆式的论点并非错误；它准确地描述了西方民主国家中具有既定宗教传统的社会组织中存在的真实现象，但它不应被视为社会组织的普遍规律。 Berggren 和 Bjornskov (2011) 通过对 105 个国家的分析得出结论：“宗教在日常生活中的重要性与信任在总体层面呈负相关关系”。我从中国的具体制度背景下进行的个人层面分析有助于解释这一发现。

Limitations  局限性

Several limitations warrant candid acknowledgment. The pooled cross-sectional design cannot definitively establish causality, though the instrumental variable analysis provides substantial evidence against purely confounding or reverse-causal explanations. The 2SLS estimate is approximately four times larger than OLS, the Wu-Hausman test rejects exogeneity (F=9.35F = 9.35F=9.35, p=.002p = .002p=.002), and two conceptually distinct instruments produce convergent estimates (Sargan p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221). These results are consistent with OLS underestimating the causal effect due to attenuation bias and reverse causality. However, the exclusion restriction, that provincial religious environment affects individual trust only through individual religious affiliation conditional on controls, remains an assumption that cannot be formally tested in the just-identified specification. Province-level religiosity is correlated with economic development, institutional quality, and cultural norms that could independently affect trust. Although I report province-clustered standard errors (79 CGSS province units) alongside HC1 SEs, clustering at the coarser 31-province level renders the IV estimate non-significant at conventional levels (p=.089p = .089p=.089), underscoring the sensitivity of the inference to the choice of clustering level. The 2SLS estimate identifies a LATE among “compliers” that may not generalize to the full population, and no single identification strategy, whether propensity score matching, inverse probability weighting, or the E-value, can fully substitute for panel data with within-person variation.
一些局限性需要坦诚承认。尽管工具变量分析提供了大量证据，表明不存在纯粹的混淆或反向因果关系，但混合横截面设计无法明确地确定因果关系。两阶段最小二乘法（2SLS）的估计值约为普通最小二乘法（OLS）的四倍，Wu-Hausman 检验拒绝了外生性假设（ F=9.35F = 9.35F=9.35 ， p=.002p = .002p=.002 ），并且两个概念上不同的工具变量产生了收敛的估计值（Sargan p=0.221p = 0.221p=0.221 ）。这些结果与 OLS 由于衰减偏差和反向因果关系而低估因果效应的观点相一致。然而，省级宗教环境仅通过控制个体宗教信仰来影响个体信任这一排除性限制，仍然是一个无法在刚刚确定的模型中正式检验的假设。省级宗教信仰与经济发展、制度质量和文化规范相关，而这些因素都可能独立地影响信任。尽管我报告了省级聚类标准误（79 个 CGSS 省级单位）以及 HC1 标准误，但以较粗略的 31 个省级为聚类单位会导致工具变量估计在常规显著性水平下不显著（ p=.089p = .089p=.089 ），这凸显了推断结果对聚类水平选择的敏感性。两阶段最小二乘法（2SLS）估计在“依从者”中识别出一个晚期效应（LATE），但该效应可能无法推广到整个人群。此外，没有任何单一的识别策略，无论是倾向得分匹配、逆概率加权还是 E 值，都无法完全替代包含个体内部变异的面板数据。

Social desirability bias may also affect results: in China, declaring religious belief on a government-affiliated survey may select for individuals who are more committed to or less concerned about conformity, potentially inflating the apparent trust deficit by selecting a non-representative subset of the religious population.
社会期望偏差也可能影响结果：在中国，在政府组织的调查中申报宗教信仰可能会选择那些更注重或不太在意从众的人，从而可能通过选择宗教人群中不具代表性的子集来夸大表面上的信任赤字。

The single-item generalized trust measure, while standard in the comparative literature (Delhey and Newton 2005; Paxton 2002), captures only one dimension of a multifaceted construct. It does not distinguish between trust in strangers, neighbors, co-workers, or institutions. As Hu (2017) and Delhey et al. (2011) have demonstrated, the “radius of trust” varies systematically across cultures and social contexts, and a single generalized trust item cannot capture whether religion affects trust toward different social targets differently. Uslaner (2002) has argued that “moralistic trust” and “strategic trust” respond to different predictors; religion may affect one without affecting the other. Relatedly, the CGSS does not measure congregational participation, social networks, or religious social support directly, the very mechanisms through which Lim and Putnam (2010) and Glanville et al. (2013) have shown religion generates trust in Western contexts. It is therefore possible that religion does build trust within Chinese religious communities but that this within-group effect is overwhelmed by between-group dynamics that the generalized trust item captures. Survey instruments that measure both particularistic and generalized trust would help disentangle these possibilities.
尽管单项广义信任测量在比较研究文献中是标准做法（Delhey 和 Newton，2005；Paxton，2002），但它仅捕捉到多维度结构中的一个方面。它无法区分对陌生人、邻居、同事或机构的信任。正如 Hu（2017）和 Delhey 等人（2011）所论证的，“信任半径”会因文化和社会背景的不同而系统性地变化，而单一的广义信任指标无法捕捉宗教对不同社会对象的信任所产生的差异性影响。Uslaner（2002）指出，“道德信任”和“策略信任”受不同的预测因素影响；宗教可能影响其中一种信任，而对另一种则无影响。此外，CGSS 并未直接测量教会参与度、社会网络或宗教社会支持，而 Lim 和 Putnam（2010）以及 Glanville 等人（2013）的研究表明，宗教正是通过这些机制在西方社会背景下产生信任的。因此，宗教或许确实能在中国宗教社群内部建立信任，但这种群体内部效应可能被群体间动态所掩盖，而这种群体间动态正是普遍信任指标所反映的。如果调查工具能够同时衡量特殊信任和普遍信任，将有助于厘清这些可能性。

The causal mediation framework of Imai et al. (2010) relies on the sequential ignorability assumption; the sensitivity analysis (ρ≈0.30\rho \approx 0.30ρ≈0.30 at ACME =0= 0=0; see Supplementary Materials, Section S9) indicates moderate robustness but does not eliminate the possibility of confounding. Finally, the missRanger imputation assumes that data are missing at random, which may not hold if religious respondents systematically decline to answer certain questions. While the proportion of missing data is small and imputation results are consistent with listwise deletion, this assumption cannot be formally tested. Additionally, the CCP membership variable underwent a coding reversal between the 2012–2013 and 2015–2023 waves, introducing the possibility of systematic miscoding. The harmonization appears straightforward, but a sensitivity analysis restricting to post-2015 waves (where coding is consistent) would provide additional reassurance; the pooled sample from 2015–2023 yields qualitatively identical results.
Imai 等人（2010）的因果中介框架依赖于序列可忽略性假设；敏感性分析（ACME =0= 0=0 处的 ρ≈0.30\rho \approx 0.30ρ≈0.30 ；参见补充材料 S9 节）表明该框架具有中等稳健性，但并未排除混淆因素的可能性。此外，missRanger 插补法假设数据随机缺失，但如果宗教受访者系统性地拒绝回答某些问题，则该假设可能不成立。虽然缺失数据的比例很小，且插补结果与列表删除法一致，但该假设无法进行正式检验。另外，中共成员身份变量在 2012-2013 年和 2015-2023 年两轮调查中经历了编码反转，这引入了系统性编码错误的可能性。虽然协调过程看似简单，但仅针对 2015 年后的调查轮次（编码一致）进行敏感性分析将提供进一步的保证；2015-2023 年的合并样本得出了性质相同的结果。

Conclusion  结论

This study set out to examine whether religion’s civic consequences, so thoroughly documented in the Western voluntary religious marketplace, travel to the regulated religious market of contemporary China. Drawing on seven waves of the Chinese General Social Survey (2012–2023, NNN = 78,993), the answer is unequivocal: they do not. Religious affiliation in China is associated with lower generalized social trust, a finding that holds across OLS, ordered logit, propensity score matching, and instrumental variable specifications, and that persists across all seven survey waves, in both urban and rural settings, and across all major religious traditions except Islam. The Putnamesque thesis, that congregational participation builds civic norms and generalized trust, is not merely inapplicable in China but substantively inverted.
本研究旨在考察在西方自愿宗教市场中得到充分证实的宗教公民影响，是否也适用于当代中国受监管的宗教市场。基于七轮中国综合社会调查（2012-2023，样本量 NNN = 78,993），答案显而易见：并非如此。在中国，宗教信仰与较低的社会信任度相关。这一发现适用于普通最小二乘法（OLS）、有序 logit 回归、倾向得分匹配和工具变量法等多种模型，且在所有七轮调查中均成立，无论城乡，也无论除伊斯兰教以外的所有主要宗教传统，这一结论都普遍存在。普特纳姆式的“宗教参与能够构建公民规范和社会信任”的理论，不仅在中国不适用，而且实质上被颠倒了。

The institutional alienation framework developed in this paper offers a coherent explanation for this reversal. In an officially atheist state where religious life is regulated, surveilled, and organizationally circumscribed, religious identity functions less as a civic resource than as a marker of social marginality. The finding that perceived social fairness accounts for 40% of the religion–trust association, while self-rated health accounts for only 6%, suggests that the trust deficit is rooted not in the personal circumstances of religious adherents but in their perception of the social order as systematically less fair. Notably, CCP membership, despite its strong positive main effect on trust (b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179), does not moderate this penalty: the religion×\times×CCP interaction is negligible (b=−0.005b = -0.005b=−0.005, p=.91p = .91p=.91), indicating that institutional integration into the party-state does not buffer the alienation that religious identity entails. Religion in China thus generates bonding capital, the existential comfort and communal solidarity reflected in the modest happiness premium, without producing the bridging capital that sustains generalized trust.
本文构建的制度异化框架为这种逆转提供了一个合理的解释。在一个官方无神论国家，宗教生活受到管制、监视和组织限制，宗教身份与其说是一种公民资源，不如说是一种社会边缘化的标志。研究发现，感知到的社会公平可以解释宗教与信任之间 40%的关联，而自我健康评价仅能解释 6%，这表明信任缺失并非源于宗教信徒的个人境况，而是源于他们对社会秩序系统性不公平的感知。值得注意的是，尽管中共党员身份对信任具有显著的正向主效应（ b=0.179b = 0.179b=0.179 ），但它并不能缓解这种负面影响：宗教 ×\times× 与中共的交互作用微乎其微（ b=−0.005b = -0.005b=−0.005 ， p=.91p = .91p=.91 ），这表明融入党国体制并不能缓冲宗教身份所带来的异化。因此，中国的宗教产生了凝聚资本，即在适度的幸福溢价中体现出的生存舒适感和社区团结，但却没有产生维持普遍信任的桥梁资本。

These findings carry implications that extend well beyond the Chinese case. The domain-specificity of religion’s effects, undermining trust while enhancing happiness, calls for theoretical frameworks that refuse to treat religion’s social consequences as monolithically positive or negative. The same religious involvement that provides meaning and community support may simultaneously narrow the radius of trust, and whether the civic or the personal dimension dominates depends on the institutional environment in which religious life is embedded. The concentration of the trust penalty among young adults aged 18–35 (b=−0.108b = -0.108b=−0.108, p<.001p < .001p<.001) raises the possibility that secularization dynamics are producing new forms of social distance between religious and non-religious youth, though distinguishing cohort from life-course effects requires panel data that the CGSS cannot provide. More broadly, the three scope conditions identified here, namely state regulation of religion, absence of congregational infrastructure, and religious identity as social marginality, suggest a framework for predicting where religion will promote and where it will erode generalized trust, from the post-Soviet Central Asian states where all three conditions hold to the American voluntary marketplace where none does.
这些发现的意义远不止于中国案例。宗教影响的领域特异性——在提升幸福感的同时削弱信任——要求我们构建新的理论框架，不再将宗教的社会后果简单地视为单一的正面或负面。宗教参与在提供意义和社群支持的同时，也可能缩小信任的范围，而公民层面还是个人层面占据主导地位，则取决于宗教生活所处的制度环境。信任惩罚在 18 至 35 岁青年群体（ b=−0.108b = -0.108b=−0.108 ， p<.001p < .001p<.001 ）中的集中出现，这提示世俗化进程可能正在造成宗教青年和非宗教青年之间新的社会距离，但要区分世代效应和生命历程效应，需要中国社会调查（CGSS）无法提供的面板数据。更广泛地说，这里确定的三个范围条件，即国家对宗教的管制、缺乏宗教基础设施以及宗教身份作为社会边缘性，为预测宗教将在哪些方面促进和在哪些方面削弱普遍信任提供了一个框架，从所有三个条件都成立的后苏联时代的中亚国家，到所有三个条件都不符合的美国自愿市场。

Despite the limitations inherent in cross-sectional survey data, the robust, multi-wave, and multi-specification nature of these findings provides strong evidence that religion’s relationship with generalized trust is fundamentally shaped by the political and institutional context in which religious life unfolds. The sociology of religion has long known that context matters; the contribution of this study is to show precisely how it matters, through which mechanisms, and for whom.
尽管横断面调查数据存在固有的局限性，但这些研究结果的稳健性、多波次和多模型设定特征有力地证明了宗教与普遍信任之间的关系从根本上受到宗教生活所处的政治和制度环境的影响。宗教社会学早已认识到环境的重要性；本研究的贡献在于精确地揭示了环境如何发挥作用、通过哪些机制以及对哪些群体发挥作用。

Note: NNN = 78,985. HC1 = heteroskedasticity-robust SEs; Cluster = province-level clustering (79 clusters). Province LOO = leave-one-out mean religiosity; OSAC = religious sites per 10k population (Yang 2018). All models include full controls and wave FE. See Supplementary Materials, Section S10.
注： NNN = 78,985。HC1 = 异方差稳健标准误；Cluster = 省级聚类（79 个聚类）。Province LOO = 留一法平均宗教信仰度；OSAC = 每万人口宗教场所数量（Yang 2018）。所有模型均包含完全控制变量和波次固定效应。参见补充材料，第 S10 节。
